100.text: The sentient is the most excited to share that just to the north of here is one of the largest windborne animals in the world. “It will be happy to eat any food you give it,” they say as they hand you a coin. “Otherwise, it’s somewhat slow, so you can just catch it.” Gain $1 and 1 boost.

101.text: The creature is skittish, but its curiosity eventually outweighs its fear, and it hops over to inspect your belongings. Gain animal [b]Item 853[/b].

1013.text: Pay $1 or $2 to add 1 or 2 boost to this card, respectively. If you don’t pay, continue.

102.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1169[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1207[/b]. Otherwise, the chest snaps shut on your finger; lose 1 health and gain 1 boost.

103.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the animals in a sign of friendship
103.text: As you wave fingers above your head and make chirping sounds, the animals relax and go about their business. One ushers you to peek into the tent, the inside of which proudly displays a random collection of items left behind long ago. Go to interior [b]Location 549[/b].

104.text: As you reach for the animal, it vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to [b]Location 511[/b] and continue.

105.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the animal with a similar chirp
105.text: The creature cocks its head to the side as if to confirm the sincerity of the gesture, then it waddles over to you. Gain animal [b]Item 803[/b].

106.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

107.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1345[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

108.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
108.text: “If you’re trying to build a collection of local flora, try plucking these rare mushrooms.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

1081.text: Roll a skill die and gain an animal based on the result ([2694d0]move[-]: [b]Item 803[/b]; [a84fc0]look[-]: [b]Item 804[/b]; [fd8c46]engage[-]: [b]Item 814[/b]; [0b955e]help[-]: [b]Item 820[/b], [fff349]take[-]: [b]Item 823[/b]; [ec1c3b]overpower[-]: [b]Item 826[/b]).

109.text: The animal you were hiding behind scurries away as the sentient turns in your direction. Their leaflike flaps flutter excitedly as they explain that they just arrived from the east by boat in search of the Cloak of Invisibility, which they believe may be found south of here. Either gain 2 boost or pay 1 boost to gain sentient [b]Item 1350[/b].

110.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
110.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]CREATE[/b][-] action.

111.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

112.text: You playfully splash the animal, and it gallops in place, eager for the company. Gain animal [b]Item 851[/b].

113.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

115.text: The cartographers will happily buy any maps in your possession for their value. They can also sell you a map of the world’s most prominent flora ([b]Item 1257[/b]) for $6 or an elixir ([b]Item 864[/b]) for $2. If you don’t buy or sell anything, they let you borrow their boat (gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b]) so you can be more interesting when you visit in the future.

116.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
116.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, consider mastering the portals of this world; there is one to the south of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

117.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a local sentient about the crystal
117.text: A stone sentient lumbers over to you. In a gravelly voice they explain that this is the Darkstone, a one-of-a-kind crystal viewed—according to prophecy—as the counterbalance to the Lightstone to the far northwest. Gain 1 random skill and quest [b]Item 1663[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply); you may continue with the [fff349]take-[b]EXTRACT[/b][-] action.

118.text: In its haste, the animal almost ignores you, but something in your tone convinces it to trust you instead. Gain animal [b]Item 804[/b].

119.text: Delighted to be of assistance, the sentient launches into a detailed explanation of the flower’s ability to heighten your senses. They kindly ask that you not touch the flowers, and they offer to be your guide in the area to satisfy your other curiosities. If you accept, gain sentient [b]Item 1353[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

012.action: [fd8c46]WIELD[-] the sniper rifle wedged between the wooden beams
012.text: You twist the sniper rifle free and swim out of the shipwreck. Gain item [b]Item 1153[/b] and exit to [b]Location 649[/b].

120.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
120.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “All technology has simple roots. Even the simplest rowboat can evolve into a mighty spaceship with enough patience and expertise.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

121.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
121.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to an active volcano on [b]Location 481[/b], northeast to a helpless animal on [b]Location 483[/b], southeast to a levitating stone on [b]Location 117[/b], or southwest to an old building on [b]Location 115[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

122.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
122.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal just like I did to let people know I crash landed here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

123.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestones. They speak to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

124.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the guard to let you enter (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
124.text: The guard points at the skeleton and makes you promise not to steal anything inside the building. They then lead you to a side room and leave you alone there. Go to interior [b]Location 554[/b].

125.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a local to tell you the correct path (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
125.text: The fire sentient winks twice and clanks away, but the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

126.text: The lock is hot to the touch, making it more difficult to pick. Finally it pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 895[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

1265.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1266.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a food card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1267.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose an armor card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1268.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a medicine card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1269.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a weapon to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

127.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
127.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal to your homeworld via the tower to the northeast.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

1270.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a map to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1271.action: [fd8c46]PLAY[-] a betting game against your customers
1271.text: The game you play depends on the quantity of boost on this structure:

choices.outcome: Bet up to $3 each on any skill type(s). Then roll 2 skill dice. For each die matching a skill on which you bet, gain double the amount you bet, then lose all coins you bet.
Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll any dice up to 6 times. If the final results are all identical, gain double the amount you bet. Otherwise, lose your bet.

Roll 6 skill dice. If the results include at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-], gain $2. You may stop and keep your winnings or proceed to roll 5 skill dice. If the results include at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-], gain $2 and you may continue with another roll (1 fewer die each round); if not, lose the $2 earned on the previous roll and end the game.

1272.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $1 or lose a token from a beverage card to gain $3. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1273.action: [fd8c46]SELL[-] a special item to a customer
1273.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a card you created on this structure to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1274.action: [fd8c46]DEFUSE[-] an argument between two sentients (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: You put your mediative skills to use in an effort to preserve diplomatic relations. Two sentients—leaf and sinew—are arguing over the ethics of eating meat vs. plants. You help them see from the other person’s perspective, even if they don’t agree. Afterwards, you choose to continue the discussion with one of them. Gain either (sinew) sentient [b]Item 1333[/b] or (leaf) sentient [b]Item 1350[/b].

1275.action: [fd8c46]WISH[-] for fame (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.text: The musical is an amazing spectacle of song, dance, and drama. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid, and gain $X, where X is the number of boost on this structure.

1277.text: The customer buys your finest drink, paying you $X (X is the number of boost on this structure). Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1278.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a garment to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1279.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] an animal to trust you or a traveler to use your stable’s services

choices.option: Coax an animal to trust you (requires that you already have a wild animal in your grid)
choices.outcome: It takes time and effort, but the animal becomes loyal to you. Replace an animal with its loyal version.

choices.option: Coax a traveler to use your stable’s services
choices.outcome: Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

128.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to give you the blade (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
128.text: The sentient enjoys the conversation but gives you the gift of time instead of a sword. The mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, but you gain some insight into how to solve it. Gain 1 time and 1 boost.

1280.action: [fd8c46]CHARM[-] a new student to join the school
1280.text: The sentient is eager to begin their studies, but first they must pay tuition. Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

1281.action: [fd8c46]TRANSMIT[-] a signal to your homeworld (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1281.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

1282.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a vehicle to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1283.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1284.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose an accessory to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1285.action: [fd8c46]SELL[-] your hatching services to a customer
1285.text: A sentient drops off an egg for you to hatch. Gain $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1286.text: The hunter is eager for a better vantage of the area. Gain $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1287.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a crystal card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1288.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a flora card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1289.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

129.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to glowing rock spires on [b]Location 133[/b], northeast to a sentient on [b]Location 427[/b], southeast to an aquatic vehicle on [b]Location 381[/b], or southwest to a lava flow on [b]Location 379[/b].
The captain asks whether you’ve tried to climb the spire (gain 1 boost). You may continue.

1290.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends, many of them appreciative of the fresh air circulating within the dome. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1291.text: Either pay 1 boost from this structure to gain $X or lose a flora card to gain its value plus $X. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

1292.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

1293.action: [fd8c46]SELL[-] your training services to a sentient
1293.text: You entice a sentient to run the obstacle course, and they’re instantly hooked. Gain $X, where X is the number of ability cards you have plus the number of boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may pay 3 boost from this structure and lose the structure itself to gain its value.

013.text: The translation earpiece on the nearby table pairs perfectly with your cranial implants. Gain item [b]Item 878[/b].

130.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to the sentients about the game they’re playing
130.text: The sentients, particularly the sentient on the left, seem eager to include you in the game. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

1305.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, showcasing a suggestive dance move (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, steering you onto the dance floor (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, taking you into their arms and soaring into the air (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1306.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, gesturing for you to plant some seeds with them (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, tickling your neck with a flower (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, sharing that their days of sowing their wild oats are over (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1307.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, scooting close to show you a map they’re working on (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, etching your initials into a hidden heart on a map (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, declaring that you have charted a way into their heart (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1308.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, sharing that it’s been a long time since they last felt the spark of romance (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, teasing your clothes with a gentle breeze (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, excited to have found love so late in life (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1309.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, their gruff facade briefly giving way to a smile (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, showing off their long list of Spor clients (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, twirling you around in their arms (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

131.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] the occupant of the tent with a story
131.text: You weave a boring tale that lulls the circuit sentient to power down, and you slip inside the tent. Go to interior [b]Location 550[/b].

1310.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, pausing their welding work to look deep into your eyes (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, showering you with sparks (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, syncing with your implants to see the world through your eyes and you through theirs (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1311.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, examining the technology of your augsuit (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, stomping their many feet in a primal courtship dance (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, assuring you that they would do anything to make the world a safer place for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1312.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, shyly lingering near you as you walk together (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, revealing that they’ve never felt this level of connection with anyone (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, sharing their precious soulstone with you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1313.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking about your favorite animals (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, boldly declaring that they would like to find an Elder Dragon with you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, wistfully dreaming of a future when the two of you can have a huge family of animals together (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1314.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking for your permission to hack into your implant briefly to learn more about you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

1316.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

1317.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, revealing a hidden tattoo that they rarely share (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, etching a tattoo into their carapace declaring their enduring affection for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1318.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, not fully trusting your intentions (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, sharing some of their favorite scavenged items with you (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, declaring that they will give up their seedy underground career for you (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

1319.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, dazzling you with a light show of torches (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

Roll 5 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with passion, claiming that their love for you is enduring against all waves (from now on, do not spend boost to place challenge dice on the slot at the upper left of this sentient).

132.action: [fd8c46]COMMUNE[-] with the sword and the stone
132.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the sword: It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

1320.text: Choose the matching response based on how many boost are on this sentient (do not spend the boost):

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with curiosity, asking about your last relationship (gain 1 boost on this sentient).
Roll 4 skill dice. If there is at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-] result, the sentient reciprocates with confidence, listing their finer qualities for you to consider (gain 1 boost on this sentient).

146.text: The energy sentient explains that they are a runekeeper. They travel the world inspecting and energizing runes so that sentients and animals can empower themselves, just as these birds are improving their eyesight by focusing on the nearby runes. They encourage you to do the same and give you a map to aid in your travels. Gain item [b]Item 1255[/b] and 1 boost; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region K).

147.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

148.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
148.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not settle down in a city like the one to the north? Make a new life for yourself here like I have!” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

149.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
149.text: “These rolling hills are the perfect location to build a way to map the world.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

150.text: The critter cautiously moves toward you, finally determining that you’re not a threat. Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b].

151.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the world. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

152.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

153.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

154.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about a quest
154.text: “If you’re trying to find the floating stones, travel just east of here.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

155.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
155.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “With the aid of helpful lava flies and quite a bit of time, you could probably build a new spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

156.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
156.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could study the portal technology found in a few areas, like the one just east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

157.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the gateway
157.text: A heavily tattooed sentient informs you that this portal is one of just a few gateways that allow travelers to jump across huge expanses. “Not everyone can just fly through towers like the energy sentients,” they say, chuckling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient invites you to the City of Fire to the near north. “Best tattoo parlors in the land.” Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-].
Your ears pop as you travel a great distance to location [b]Location 664[/b].

Gain sentient [b]Item 1340[/b] and quest [b]Item 1628[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1582.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might find a sentient to hire. Choose one:Go to location [b]Location 718[/b].Stay at your current location and gain $3.

1583.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a pleasant location featuring a treasure chest. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 253[/b] on a mesa.Go to [b]Location 416[/b] in a quiet cove.Go to [b]Location 432[/b] along a beach.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1584.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might find an animal. Choose one:Go to location [b]Location 704[/b].Stay at your current location. The sentient gives you some fruit that may be enticing to animals you encounter (gain item [b]Item 1224[/b]).

1585.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a tower. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 349[/b] in the prairie.Go to [b]Location 442[/b] in the desert.Go to [b]Location 458[/b] along a canal.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1586.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a peaceful location featuring an orb. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 198[/b] in some rolling hills.Go to [b]Location 208[/b] in the mountains.Go to [b]Location 279[/b] on a seaside cliff.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1587.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just outside a city. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 186[/b], the entrance to Windmill Village.Go to [b]Location 473[/b], the entrance to the City of Leaves.Go to [b]Location 677[/b], the entrance to Treetrunk Village.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1588.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: A helpful sentient offers you some advice and a pep talk. Choose one:

choices.option: If you have not equipped your character’s personal item
choices.outcome: Gain [0b955e]2 help[-].

choices.option: If you have your character’s personal item but not an objective
choices.outcome: Gain up to 2 boost on it.

choices.option: If you have your character’s personal objective
choices.outcome: Gain any 2 skills.

1589.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: A helpful sentient gives you a spare fish trap (gain item [b]Item 910[/b]) and offers to lead you to a location just south of where you will find the kraken. Choose one:Go to location [b]Location 749[/b].Stay at your current location and gain [ec1c3b]3 overpower[-].

159.text: The sentients ask if you’re seeking the services of a smelter or tattoo artist:

choices.outcome: If you pay $3, the sentient shakes off some lava and joins you (gain sentient [b]Item 1316[/b] and quest [b]Item 1695[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). If you don’t pay, they recommend that you earn your keep in the City of Fire to the west of here (gain 1 boost).
The sentient volunteers to accompany you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1317[/b].

1590.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might advance toward this goal. Choose one:Go to location [b]Location 731[/b].Stay at your current location and gain [2694d0]3 move[-].

1591.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a good place to build. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 185[/b] in the prairie.Go to [b]Location 229[/b] on the edge of a cliff.Go to [b]Location 272[/b] in the desert.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1592.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just outside a city. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 238[/b], the entrance to the Eternal City.Go to [b]Location 342[/b], the entrance to the Golden City.Go to [b]Location 727[/b], the entrance to the City of Stone.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1593.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1593.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a trial; they warn you that it is possible to fail these trials. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 110[/b], the Trial of Beauty.Go to [b]Location 174[/b], the Trial of Endurance.Go to [b]Location 184[/b], the Trial of Life.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1594.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1594.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring a skeleton. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 137[/b] in the highlands.Go to [b]Location 700[/b] in a pasture.Go to [b]Location 720[/b] in a bog.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

1595.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1595.text: A helpful sentient offers to give you a basic item that can be crafted into a weapon. Gain item [b]Item 1093[/b].

1596.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1596.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a location just south of where you might advance toward this goal. Choose one:Go to location [b]Location 732[/b].Stay at your current location and gain [2694d0]3 move[-].

1597.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for someone to support your mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1597.text: A helpful sentient offers to lead you to a temperate location featuring an artifact. Choose one:Go to [b]Location 187[/b] on the prairie.Go to [b]Location 318[/b] in the jungle.Go to [b]Location 339[/b] in the dustlands.Stay at your current location and gain 1 boost.

160.text: The sentient offers to sell you an axe (item [b]Item 1042[/b]) for $3. They also mention that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the east (gain 1 boost).

161.text: Bashing the volcanic crust is the sentient’s responsibility, but they’re willing to share the load. They offer to either pay you (gain $5) or aid you on your journey (gain sentient [b]Item 1315[/b]).

162.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Fire recommends a tattoo parlor and a bakery, both on the same street. Gain 2 boost.

163.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal over to you with a playful tone
163.text: The huge turtle is eager to have an audience, and it proudly spins on its shell—perhaps a trick they learned from a previous companion. Gain animal [b]Item 813[/b].

164.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
164.text: “If you’re on a treasure hunt, there is a rare amulet in the eye of the volcano. Of course, if you like collecting things, you could try to win a duel instead.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

1645.text: Each suspect knew the victim and was seen in the area around the time the crime was committed. You ask why they were here and receive the following answers:Shipwright: “I swear it wasn’t me. Why would I kill the best mechanic in the area? I drifted by here this morning so Timber could take a look at the motor I’m fiddling with. Damned thing is so loud, and even Timber couldn’t get it to quiet down!”Fisherman: “I can’t believe they’re gone. Just yesterday we went fishing together in the bay, and Timber caught a big ‘ole pike. Hey, a pike—ironic how that was also the murder weapon! They couldn’t stand the sight of blood, so I cleaned the fish and dropped it off this morning.”Recruiter: “I’m offended that my integrity is being called into question—I’m here to solve the murder, too! Timber was one of my top recruits. We had a friendly sparring session the last time I was here, but it was all in good fun. In fact, I left my bone sword here. You can see there isn’t a speck of blood on it.”

165.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

1657.action: [fd8c46]ACTIVATE[-] the portals (if you don’t have the Teleportation spell, perform another action instead)
1657.text: The portals spring to life. Four of them show glimmers of distant locations; a small altar in front of the center portal suggests that you can choose another destination in exchange for a small sacrifice. Gain destiny [b]Item 1604[/b], then rotate quest [b]Item 1657[/b] and add it to your grid, which adds an [2694d0]ENTER[-] action that you can use only on location [b]Location 690[/b] (if you do, read entry [b]Item 1657[/b] in the [2694d0]move[-] storybook).

166.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the occupant of the house from a safe distance
166.text: The reclusive occupant is hesitant but hospitable—they help you steer clear of the dangerous tree to the right. Soon you’re regaling them with tales of your adventure, and while they don’t invite you inside, they offer you some food and a nice compass— they rarely leave this area, so they don’t need it. Gain item [b]Item 968[/b] and 1 health.

167.text: The sentient is too tired to say much at first, but they open up after pouring themselves a cup of magma and giving you something more palatable. They are a smelter, one of many among their people. Their life is a grind, and they long for the spark of something new and adventurous. If you invite them to join you, gain sentient [b]Item 1316[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 health.

168.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

1680.text: A group of sentients approaches, hanging on each other, drinking, and singing. At first they think you’re kidding when you turn them away, but you stand your ground and they head back east. Add 1 token to quest [b]Item 1680[/b].

1687.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1688.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1689.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

169.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
169.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough help from the fire sentients to the southeast of here, you could rebuild your spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

1690.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1691.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1692.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

170.text: The rock seems adamant about remaining on whatever invisible axis that keeps it tethered to the arch. You can spin it faster temporarily, but it always returns to its original speed. Gain 1 boost and continue.

1701.text: You host a quiet gathering of old friends. Gain 1 boost on each sentient in your grid.

1705.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the rescue team with gratitude and open arms, ending your adventure
1705.text: The game ends as you head back to your homeworld, and you achieve an epic victory if you have also completed the mission. Otherwise, it is impressive that you survived long enough to control your destiny, and your knowledge of the planet will benefit you in the future.

171.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

172.text: As soon as the ship’s crew notices you, they eagerly steer the boat over to pick you up. They give you some kind of meat jerky (gain 1 health) and offer to drop you off northwest at some levitating stones on [b]Location 251[/b], northeast near a treasure chest on [b]Location 253[/b], southeast at a monstrous elemental on [b]Location 168[/b], or southwest at a glowing tree on [b]Location 166[/b] (or you may remain here).

173.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1315[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

174.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
174.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ENDURE[/b][-] action.

175.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to let you taste the sparkling substance (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
175.text: The sentient’s eyes shift to the left and right, then they gesture for you to approach. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

176.text: It’s hard to get their attention, but finally one steps away from the twister. “Can’t you see we’re busy dancing?” they say. You quickly improvise and say that you were hoping to join them, and without hesitation they pull you away. You copy their movements, and within a few minutes you feel the elation of the dance. Gain ability [b]Item 1469[/b] and 1 morale.

177.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a nearby sentient about the flags
177.text: The sentient explains that these flags mark the boundaries of wind sentient territory. Each of these five particular flags represents one of the five original wind sentients who decided their people would stop roaming the world and would instead settle down in this place. They kindly ask that you not walk north through this field. Gain ability [b]Item 1470[/b] and 2 boost.

178.text: The sentient isn’t looking for anything in particular, but they’re open to trading one of the flowers if you pay $2 or lose a card of any value from your grid/reserve. If you agree, gain flora [b]Item 1076[/b]. If not, they offer you a breath of fresh air (gain item [b]Item 1212[/b]).

179.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

018.text: The old padlock creaks open, giving you a burst of confidence. Gain 2 morale and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 045[/b].

180.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the sentient with respect and reverence
180.text: The elder responds well to your approach, and they ask you to join them in the shade for a refreshment (gain 1 health). They mostly talk about flags, one of the ways wind sentients can see wind patterns from a distance. If you’re interested, you could place some flags in the surrounding grasslands (gain quest [b]Item 1669[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply). If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

181.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] about the contents of the chest
181.text: The sentients eye each other warily, hesitant to talk. But your genuine curiosity helps them open up, and they share that the chest contains an extremely rare seed. They have been tasked with guarding it until the day comes for the seed to be planted and spread Spor across the world. Gain ability [b]Item 1470[/b] and 2 boost.

182.action: [fd8c46]TAUNT[-] the sentient despite them having the upper hand
182.text: The sentient pauses, not expecting such big words from a comparatively small alien. Then they break into laughter, asking you to repeat the insult as they call over their friend. They introduce themselves as the Spormonger, and they offer to accompany you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1309[/b].

183.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] with the sentient while they dance
183.text: The sentient is practicing for something called the Trial of Life, a rite of initiation for wind sentients and anyone else who embraces the wind culture. It’s found to the east. Gain 2 boost and continue.

184.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the queen (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
184.text: The queen nods in approval and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]ENLIVEN[/b][-] action.

185.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the ruins
185.text: The sentient explains, “This was once some sort of shelter, though definitely not built by wind sentients, who live in tents and windmills.” You could restore it to its former glory or head inside to see if there’s anything remaining among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

186.text: A sentient heading out of Windmill Valley recommends the map vendor and the seed market. Gain $1 and 2 boost.

187.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] the sentients with a haunting-yet-commanding tune on the horn
187.text: All around you, sentients kneel at the power of your song. The artifact is yours. Gain item [b]Item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

188.text: The sentient offers to sell you the sharpest blade for $5. If you pay, gain item [b]Item 1189[/b]. If you don’t pay, they give you some scrap metal instead (gain item [b]Item 1184[/b]).

189.text: A flat-bottom ferry drifts over to you, and the captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and you may go northwest to see the Traveler on [b]Location 193[/b], northeast to a charming confluence on [b]Location 398[/b], north to a tornado on [b]Location 194[/b], or southwest to a dancing sentient on [b]Location 183[/b].
The captain advises you not to wade across the wetlands (gain 1 boost).

190.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
190.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, the occupant of this cave—while incredibly dangerous—may be the key to a triumphant escape.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

191.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1338[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

192.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient if you can have a sip of the liquid in the jug
192.text: With the gusts of wind, you really need to shout to get the sentient’s attention. They give you the jug but advise against drinking its contents. Gain item [b]Item 866[/b].

193.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
193.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, legend tells of an elder dragon that is unbothered by the void of space. If it exists, you may find it in a cave to the west of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

194.text: You shout at the sentients over the roar of the tornado, and they stop long enough to hear you out. Remarkably, as soon as they stop moving, the twister dissipates. The sentients fly over to you, explaining that they are dueling for their family’s honor. You suggest that instead of hurting each other, they both cast the most powerful spell they can muster, and you will judge the results. The sentients, tired from their battle, are grateful for the solution. Gain spell [b]Item 1379[/b].

195.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
195.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $7 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino ([b]Item 1271[/b]), well ([b]Item 1275[/b]), theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]), tavern ([b]Item 1277[/b]), school ([b]Item 1280[/b]), or training grounds ([b]Item 1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

196.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

197.text: With pride, they share that they’re a cartographer. Their responsibilities include a combination of mapmaking, wind measurement, and seed positioning. You’re curious whether they have any maps for sale, and they reply that for $5 they can either sell you a skeleton map (gain item [b]Item 1254[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 11 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region A]) or a tower map (gain item [b]Item 1259[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 16 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region A]). If you don’t pay, gain 2 boost instead.

198.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

199.text: With the sentient watching with bemusement, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1036[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Otherwise, the chest attempts to eat you; lose 1 health.

020.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

200.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a passing metal sentient to guide you through the clouds (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
200.text: The sentient furtively agrees to help. Choose one:

choices.option: Accept directions to a bandit hideout
choices.outcome: Gain [a84fc0]3 look[-] and continue.

Roll 3 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. If you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], you successfully follow the sentient to the bandit hideout (go to interior [b]Location 563[/b]). Otherwise go north to [b]Location 205[/b].

201.text: The sentient swivels in midair, surprised by your sudden appearance. “State your name and intent!” they say. Unable to find you in their database, they explain that they patrol the area around the King of Thieves to the northeast, and they don’t want any trouble from you if you head there. Gain 1 boost.

202.text: If you pay $4, they agree to accompany you in exchange for a few coins (gain sentient [b]Item 1337[/b]). If you don’t pay, they instead encourage you to push the button on the runecaster to see what happens (gain 2 engage).

203.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to let you into the building (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
203.text: Without ever meeting your eyes, the sentient accepts your bribe. Inside you find a sentient who could not be happier to see a friendly face. Gain sentient [b]Item 1349[/b].

204.text: You’re happy to see some curious faces appear at the windows of the house. Choose one:

choices.option: Share a story with the occupants
choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 556[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with the residents to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items [b]Item 907[/b], [b]Item 912[/b], [b]Item 1040[/b], and [b]Item 1158[/b], and structure [b]Item 1688[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

205.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about what makes the lotus special
205.text: “Various sentients have different traditions; some simply smell the lotus while others eat it raw or brew it into a tincture. I’ve heard good and bad things.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

206.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the treasure chest
206.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 951[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1163[/b]. Otherwise, a claw shoots out of the treasure chest and grabs a few coins from your pocket (lose $2).

207.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the king (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
207.text: The King of Thieves nods in approval and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]BYPASS[/b][-] action.

208.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

209.text: To mimic the animal, you skitter around the clearing, keeping a safe distance from the creature. Your comical effort convinces the animal that you are friend, not foe. Gain animal [b]Item 828[/b].

021.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

210.text: The sentient waves but refuses to come any closer to the object. Over the howl of the wind they yell something about it being a powerful magnet, a trap set by metal sentients for unsuspecting travelers. Gain 2 boost and continue.

211.text: Sell any number of items of value $10 or higher, gaining the total value of the sold items, plus $X more. If you choose not to sell, the sentient asks that you fetch a rare item for them (gain quest [b]Item 1658[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

212.text: The animal lumbers in your direction, metallic joints scraping and grinding. The creature is eager to entertain, and soon it’s rolling around on the ground in front of you. Gain animal [b]Item 829[/b].

213.action: [fd8c46]LURE[-] a guard away from the building
213.text: As soon as the guard leaves to investigate, you dash toward the forcefield and then ease through it. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior [b]Location 513[/b].

214.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride over to the cave
214.text: A guide offers you a piggyback ride for a $3 fee, advising you on the trickster sentinel waiting inside the cave. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 034[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The guide agrees that you’re better off not entering the City of Shadows and instead recommends seeking a more interesting destination via the orb to the southwest. Gain 1 boost.

215.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on a side entrance
215.text: The door swings open after some difficulty. Go to interior [b]Location 557[/b].

216.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] to the proprietor of your collection
216.text: The museum docent isn’t easily impressed. Choose one:

choices.option: ( If you have an item or animal worth $10 or more) Show off one of your more impressive acquisitions
choices.outcome: The docent is impressed and ushers you inside (go to interior [b]Location 564[/b]).
Go to interior [b]Location 564[/b].
You’re compelled to do something you can truly boast about. Gain destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

217.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the owner of the fence to let you through (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
217.text: The sentient hovers nearby, admiring their handiwork. “This fence has been in my family for generations, primarily to keep snow pigs from digging up our land. You’re welcome to pass, though I’d also recommend the lodestone to the east—it’s popular with tourists.” Gain 2 boost; you may go north to [b]Location 222[/b] or east to [b]Location 218[/b].

218.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
218.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “This world offers powers beyond the normal grasp of humans. Mastering magic—like that found in this lodestone—presents an opportunity for you to travel great distances in a single step.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1604[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

219.text: The sentient proudly puffs their chest and proclaims that they are the eastern sentry of the greatest energy source in the metal kingdom. “It powers the City of Sha—” They cut themselves off, realizing they’ve said too much. They throw some shiny coins as a distraction before flying away. Gain $2 and 1 boost.

022.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

220.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this harsh planet
220.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, you could partner with the circuit sentients—they have the technology but not the willpower to disconnect themselves. But please also consider staying here—yes, it’s cold in this area, but nothing that a thick coat or fire can’t handle.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

221.text: The creature takes pity on you and tries to help. Gain animal [b]Item 808[/b].

222.text: The distraught pup is eager to find a friend and tries to steer you northeast. Gain animal [b]Item 810[/b].

223.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

224.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a fellow traveler to build a structure in the valley
224.text: The sentient offers you their services for a $7 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a cartographer ([b]Item 1270[/b]), embassy ([b]Item 1274[/b]), tower ([b]Item 1281[/b]), or outpost ([b]Item 1292[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost). You may continue.

225.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] the occupants of the tent with a bedtime story
225.text: You weave a plodding tale that puts both sentients to sleep. After helping yourself to their food, you slip inside the tent. Gain 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 551[/b].

226.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passerby about the beam of light
226.text: A sentient informs you that at its base is something called the Gauntlet of Life, one of the twelve most precious, ancient artifacts in the world. They have a friend who once tried to harness the energy of the Gauntlet, and they came quite close. “They started with the number 4 before choosing incorrectly,” they recall before walking away. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

227.text: It takes longer than you’d like, but you finally locate the owner of the vehicle. They offer to sell you the flying carpet for $8. If you buy the carpet, gain vehicle [b]Item 985[/b]. Otherwise, the owner expresses their gratitude for you not simply stealing their vehicle, and they offer you a ride down to the base of the cliff. If you accept their offer, go north to [b]Location 232[/b]; otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

228.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient about the tower and the surrounding area
228.text: The sentient is part of a group of messengers who use the towers to travel to faraway lands. They gesture to their homeland—the swamps at the base of the cliff—saying there are other towers to the west and a place called the Eternal City to the north. Gain 2 boost. You may continue with an [fd8c46]engage-◆6-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action (the result is found in entry [b]Location 228[/b] in the Book of Secrets).

229.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about Moonstone Mountain
229.text: “I’m sorry to say that there’s nothing on the mountain itself. However, legend says that when the moon dips low enough in the sky to fill the void in the mountain, those who look upon it will be granted an ancient power.” Gain 1 boost. You may lose 1 time to wait for the moon; if you do, gain lesson [b]Item 1432[/b].

023.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

230.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
230.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $6 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a barn ([b]Item 1266[/b]), winery ([b]Item 1272[/b]), windmill ([b]Item 1273[/b]), stables ([b]Item 1279[/b]), hatchery ([b]Item 1285[/b]), hunting tower ([b]Item 1286[/b]), crystal mine ([b]Item 1287[/b]), garden ([b]Item 1288[/b]), or greenhouse ([b]Item 1291[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

231.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] an insider to look the other way as you borrow the artifact (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
231.text: You casually stroll away with the artifact hidden away. If you pay 3 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item [b]Item 1001[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

232.text: Following your instincts, you speak to the light as if it understands you. When the light forms eyes, it’s almost like you’re looking into your own soul. Gain 2 morale.

233.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $1 to reduce this cost to 0)
233.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]TRANSLATE[/b][-] action.

234.text: The sentients look at each other before responding, their trust for outsiders apparently quite low. After introductions are made, you move to step toward them, and they insist that you stop. “The springblade lilies in this swamp have a taste for landwalkers like you. We advise that you walk around them, not over them.” Gain 1 boost.

235.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about the dangers that await you in this area
235.text: “Beware of the energy elemental to the northeast. It will look deep into your soul in ways I cannot explain. I hope someday the energy sentients will come to their senses and destroy the ancient beast instead of just chaining it to these lands.” Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

236.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

choices.outcome: The sentient offers to sell you a torch ([b]Item 1086[/b]) for $4 and/or they can pay $5 to gain 1 card in your grid or reserve (lose that card). They also mention that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the east (gain 1 boost).

choices.option: Interact with the orb thanks to the sentient’s assistance
choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

238.text: A sentient heading out of the Eternal City recommends the lantern store and the cafe. Gain 2 boost.

239.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a sentient for help at the treehouse
239.text: The sentient signals the shopkeeper, who explains that they typically sell lanterns to energy sentients— that’s where they sleep. But the lanterns also function as lighting instruments, and they offer to sell you a special version. You may pay $6 to gain item [b]Item 953[/b] or decline; either way, gain 1 boost.

024.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

240.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

241.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] a crystal you have (lose it) for this crystal (if you don’t have a crystal, select a different action)
241.text: The stone sentient accepts the exchange. Gain item [b]Item 1161[/b].

242.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

243.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1325[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

244.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

245.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

246.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—I can’t stay, but can I offer you some food?” Gain 2 health.

247.action: [fd8c46]DEFUSE[-] the tension and assure the sentients that they can work together to find common ground
247.text: All three sentients turn to you, shocked that an outsider would dare speak in the Council of Three. “We’ve been debating our role in this world for centuries, and you think you can just walk in here and suddenly we’ll all get along? This guy, am I right?” The sentients share a laugh and mock you mercilessly, even after you turn and walk away. You’re left with a little hope. Gain 2 morale.

248.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the tree
248.text: The sentient explains that the tree is a gift from leaf sentients, an offering of knowledge. It can’t fully be understood until you read the words yourself, so they teach you some basic orthography. Gain ability [b]Item 1494[/b].

249.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal over to you with a friendly chirp
249.text: You kneel and beckon toward the creature, acting as welcoming and harmless as possible. Gain animal [b]Item 823[/b].

025.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

250.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient whether the pink box is theirs
250.text: “No,” the sentient says, “but watch out for those thorns if you take it.” Gain 1 boost and either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

251.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the spinning stones
251.text: The sentient laughs. “Oh, that’s a trap. See the sand centipede in the pit? It’s trying to lure unsuspecting tourists for a midday snack.” Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

252.text: The sentient boasts that they are a falconer—they control marrow vultures who scout the surrounding area. The bones they wear reflect their craft. You may either gain a marrow vulture (animal [b]Item 826[/b]) with 1 boost on it, or gain sentient [b]Item 1331[/b].

253.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 886[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, the treasure chest bursts into flames, scalding your hands (suffer 1 heat damage).

254.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] some passing sentients about the pits
254.text: A bulky sentient clarifies that these pits are animal tracks heading north, where you can see a faint cloud of red dust rising in the distance. They offer to sell you a wok to use in case you hunt the animal. You may pay $2 to gain item [b]Item 907[/b] or decline; either way, gain 1 boost.

255.text: Before the sentients get too close, you draw a line in the sand and dare the sentients to cross it. They apologize for the confusion, saying that they’re just looking for someone to complete their hunting trio. Gain sentient [b]Item 1333[/b], 1 boost, and quest [b]Item 1649[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

256.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1500[/b].

257.text: The beasts fly away, leaving you alone with the sentient. “Thank you for doing that,” they say, their eyes downcast. “I came to this arid land in the hopes of planting seeds with a friend to the north, but I stumbled into this trap. Please, take these seeds and bring life to this accursed desert.” Gain item [b]Item 1021[/b].

258.text: The peddler offers you the opportunity to purchase one item (gain the card). You may pay $4 for the mace ([b]Item 969[/b]), $6 for the lyre ([b]Item 970[/b]), $8 for the sword ([b]Item 888[/b]), or $3 for the climbing shoes ([b]Item 963[/b]). You may also sell the peddler 1 card from your grid or reserve to gain its value. Afterwards, seeing how you’re sweltering in the heat, they recommend that you travel to the east or south.

259.text: After a few tries, you perfectly mimic the animal’s chirps, punctuated by a few assertive stomps on the ground. The animal changes its route to follow you. Gain animal [b]Item 824[/b].

026.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

260.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal with an overabundance of gesticulation
260.text: It scuttles over to you and looks for you to lead the way. Gain animal [b]Item 825[/b].

261.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
261.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action.

262.text: A sentient headed out of the City of Bones toward the cooler climate to the south recommends the casino and the bone market. Gain 2 boost; you may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]DESCEND[/b][-] action.

263.text: As you hum a tune you learned as a child, the stonelike bulbs around the flower begin to move—they’re all part of the same organism! The song seems to placate the flower, and one of the bulbs pours water into your open palm. Gain 1 morale and 1 health; you may continue.

264.action: [fd8c46]WHISPER[-] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
264.text: The sentient reveals that these ruins are linked to a secret society of sinew sentients who control the legendary Bone Harness. Within the ruins, you’ll need to activate a circular blue button to gain access to an ancient test. Gain 1 boost and continue.

265.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the captor to free their captive (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
265.text: If you paid at least $1 for this action, the bounty hunter releases the circuit sentient to you (gain sentient [b]Item 1314[/b]). Otherwise, gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

266.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the proprietor about the cost to enter the building
266.text: The owner of the casino welcomes you inside—entry is free. Go to interior [b]Location 558[/b].

267.text: Your offer of a trade gets their attention. Lose an item or flora to earn the sentient’s allegiance (gain sentient [b]Item 1306[/b]). Also gain 1 health from the oasis.

268.text: Despite the heat, you manage to lower the temperature between the two sentients and convince them to walk away. Neither will speak to you afterward. Gain 2 boost.

269.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] for assistance as the storm approaches
269.text: You hear a voice in your head compelling you to move east to safety and security if you just offer a little help in return. Without realizing it, you find your feet walking in that direction. Go to [b]Location 446[/b] and gain [0b955e]1 help[-].

027.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

270.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps on your leg like a trap; gain 1 boost and (if possible) lose 1 skill.

271.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
271.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, send a signal to your homeworld. There is a tower to the northeast of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

272.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] some passing sentients about the hovering rocks
272.text: The fleshy sentients seem pleased that you would ask. “We sinew sentients believe that the number 3 is sacred—at least, most of us do. Three schools of magic, three hunters in a pack, and so on. Some say that these pillars of energy are the origin of this tradition. If it’s too hot for you here, please head northwest or northeast.” Gain 3 boost.

273.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

274.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

275.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

276.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] of your skills at dice and card games
276.text: The sentients are delighted and invite you to duel against the winner of the next game to see if you can back up your grandstanding. Place card [b]Location 798[/b] on the table (it’s a large card) and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

277.text: Your attempts at mimicry confuse the beast enough that there’s time for you to dash north. You may go to [b]Location 282[/b].

278.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] for someone to grant you safe passage, proclaiming an unwritten rule from your pursuit of knowledge across the galaxy
278.text: Murmurs from within the wall carry across the quiet desert. You hear the creaking sound of rusty hinges, and a hole opens in the wall, revealing a slim view of the north. You may either go north to [b]Location 283[/b] or continue.

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the interior of the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the inside of the orb contains a map of this region. They appreciate your curiosity, and they offer to travel with you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1344[/b].

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the exterior of the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

028.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could flirt with other sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for crystal collectors. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 088[/b].

280.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient about the surrounding area
280.text: The sentient shares how the sand sentients once occupied the monolithic buildings to the south, but they now prefer to live outside with few material attachments. Gain 2 boost.

281.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sand sentient about the building
281.text: The sentient explains that this structure is a Sand Cathedral, a place for sand sentients to research the history and behaviors of other cultures. Gain 1 boost and go to interior [b]Location 795[/b].

282.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a sand sentient about the beam of light in the distance
