282.text: The sand sentient communicates directly into your mind. “Many have tried, but few have succeeded in climbing to the top of the Memory Palace to the north.” Gain [2694d0]1 move[-]. The sentient offers you the choice of purpose (gain quest [b]Item 1630[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or enhancement (gain ability [b]Item 1515[/b]).

283.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1308[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

284.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the crystal. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

285.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

286.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to join you (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
286.text: The multi-faced sentient takes a vote with itself, and two out of three favor joining you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1342[/b].

287.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
287.text: “If you’re trying to better understand the origin of life on this planet, consider the wonders within the Memory Palace. Navigation might be slightly easier than cautious climbing, though you’ll miss the spectacular view.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

288.text: You accentuate your ears and chirp just like the animal, which seems to endear it to you. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

289.text: The balloon drifts over to you and the captain invites you aboard if you’re heading northeast (if so, go to [b]Location 466[/b]). If not, they suggest you check out the impressive skeleton they sailed over to the southwest (gain 1 boost).

029.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

290.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1473[/b].

291.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
291.text: “If you’re big game hunting, few animals exceed the size of the sand centipede hidden under the desert here. For a safer approach to achieving legendary acclaim, maybe just try to win a duel instead?” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

292.action: [fd8c46]BEFRIEND[-] a sentient heading into the cave
292.text: The sentient, a shady character with a glint in their eye, takes a liking to you. They lead you into the cave, opening an ironclad barrier with a swipe of a card and shoving you inside. Go to cave [b]Location 085[/b].

293.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

294.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the sounds of a prowling predator to awaken the occupants from their slumber
294.text: Your growl echoes across the quiet night, sending the campers stumbling out into the desert. You slip inside the tent. Go to interior [b]Location 552[/b].

295.text: The sentient speaks with a sense of pride about their work. The orbs they create are wayfinders to help wayward travelers identify their general location. They’re made of glass, but the glass liquefies upon touch to allow entry. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The interior of the orb displays a map of this region, and it pinpoints your current location. Look at page 4 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is NE-2. Gain 1 boost.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

choices.option: Ask the sentient if there’s anything about the surrounding area you should know
choices.outcome: The sentient assures you that you’ll find a more temperate climate to the north. Gain 1 health and 1 boost.

296.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

297.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

298.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

299.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

030.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could share a meal with their fellow sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for bankers to brush by them as if they’re nothing. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 090[/b].

300.text: The animal is suffering, but it at least sees that you are trying to help. If you pay [0b955e]2 help[-], you remove a thorn from the animal’s head (gain animal [b]Item 841[/b]). If not, gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

301.text: As the creature hovers nearby, you feel some part of you—an aura, if you can call it that—extend toward the sentient and make contact. The sentient proceeds to speak to you fluently, welcoming you to witness the ceremony below. They describe with nonchalance that members of their sect are in the process of extracting the last of a sacrificial water sentient’s life force. Either gain 1 boost or lose 1 non-energy sentient to gain item [b]Item 1243[/b] and lose the energy curse (if you have it).

302.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] the falconer to send messages to your friends
302.text: The old sentient offers you a deal: If you pay $1, they will send birds to each of your crewmembers, delivering a message of hope in your own handwriting (each player gains 1 morale). You may also or instead pay $3, in which case they’ll join you on your journey (gain sentient [b]Item 1331[/b]). If you don’t pay, they give you an egg instead (gain 1 health).

303.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestones. They speak to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

304.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to a one-eyed guard while they load the cannon
304.text: You’ve picked the worst possible time to chat with the guard, as there is a pirate ship on the horizon that they’re trying to ward away. The guard tells you to take cover inside the outpost. Go to interior [b]Location 566[/b].

305.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the front door
305.text: The lock pops open, and you follow the winding staircase to the top of the lighthouse. Go to interior [b]Location 597[/b].

306.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the island. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

307.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1487[/b].

308.action: [fd8c46]INTERACT[-] with the animal or the orb

choices.outcome: The animal is clearly in pain, but it can’t resist your playful gesture. You notice a large gash on its back. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]HEAL[/b][-] or [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]RELIEVE[/b][-] action.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

309.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] to the pirates in a playful way
309.text: The crew of the pirate ship is soon cheering for your bold, boisterous boasts. They invite you aboard and regale you with food (gain 1 health). Before you leave, they give you a map to various treasure chests (gain item [b]Item 1260[/b]) and send you on your way.

031.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could play games with other sentinels during breaks. Now they just stand here all day waiting for anyone who dares to face the serpent. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 091[/b].

310.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

311.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

312.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
312.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest close to the Universal Academy on [b]Location 316[/b], northeast to a curious riverside on [b]Location 318[/b], southeast to a blue animal on [b]Location 308[/b], or southwest to a purple shard on [b]Location 306[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

313.text: Emboldened by the other birds, the closest creature shows no fear in paddling over to you. Gain animal [b]Item 816[/b].

314.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] to see whether anyone claims ownership of the boat
314.text: A sentient emerges from a shoreside cave, blinking in the sun. They hand you a mask, cautioning you to wear it if you go deep into the cave. Gain item [b]Item 964[/b]; you may go to cave [b]Location 037[/b].

315.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
315.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could send a signal from a tower to those looking for you.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

316.text: It’s a bit like talking to your cats—it doesn’t make sense to you, but it delights the creature. Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

317.text: The animal eagerly stumbles into the water next to you, its chest heaving. While you whisper to it in a soothing voice, another animal comes into view, a massive lizard with thick, stone-like scales. It doesn’t seem intimidated by you or the other animal, but after its eyes dart around the various boulders that surround you, it leaves you alone. Gain animal [b]Item 851[/b].

318.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the long-eared guards hidden in the bushes to look the other way as you borrow the artifact
318.text: You casually stroll away with the artifact hidden away. If you pay 2 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item [b]Item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.text: The tiny creature seems to want to take a break from its task, and your gentle coaxing is all the excuse it needs. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b].

032.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

320.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

321.text: The sentient shares that this is the Universal Academy, where students gather from around the world to learn magic. You are welcome to join (go to interior [b]Location 600[/b]) or stay outside (gain 1 boost).

322.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to the sentient about the flower
322.text: The little sentient swells with pride over their creation, a special flower arrangement they made for extra credit. Someday they hope to pass the Trial of Beauty to the distant northeast and become an honorary leaf sentient. Gain 2 boost.

323.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a question about the diagram on the chalkboard
323.text: The instructor explains that the triangle represents the three types of magic: life, spirit, and mind. Today they’re focusing on life mana. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b].

324.text: The beautiful creature seems to glow when you try to interact with it, and its energy fills you with warmth. The animal is suffering, though, and needs your help. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

325.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

326.text: You place your palm on the golden web, letting the creature know through the vibrations that you are neither predator nor prey. Gain animal [b]Item 819[/b].

327.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1039[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain $10. Otherwise, if you haven’t already disarmed the chest, the chest strikes your lower jaw; you’re more embarrassed than hurt (lose 1 morale).

328.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the guard to let you pass (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
328.text: The sentient explains that the encampment is a place for caravans to stop briefly before continuing their journey. They agree to guide you to either the city to the northwest ([b]Location 332[/b]) or the market to the north ([b]Location 333[/b]). Gain sentient [b]Item 1323[/b] and go to one of those locations.

329.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about whether this sentient could help you escape this planet
329.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, this sentient’s quest offers a dangerous-yet-compelling option for you. I recommend listening to them.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1602[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

033.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

330.text: “Gold sentients aren’t born with a husk—the human equivalent of a skeleton. Rather, they all start off more like a golden slug seeking a shell. It’s a coming-of-age process to find the right husk after it’s shed by a gilded beetle, and sometimes it takes multiple husks to find the right match. Sometimes it’s a brand-new husk; other times it’s a husk passed down from one generation to the next.” Gain 2 boost.

331.text: The act of talking to a tree is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

332.text: A sentient heading out of the Gilded Village recommends the dice casino and the guildhall at the top of the tower. They kindly give you the password to enter the city. Gain $1, 2 boost, and [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

333.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the shop owner what they’re selling
333.text: The sentient counts off a number of items, including a welding tool, a vented jacket, and some special goggles. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

choices.option: Ask the sentient what happened to them
choices.outcome: The sentient says that they were gambling to the northwest, and they bet more than they could afford. This suffering is their punishment. They beg for your help to pay off their debt, and they offer you part of their collection for the duel. Gain a random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card; you can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions) and quest [b]Item 1682[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Ask the sentient about the orb
choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

335.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to the peddlers about recent news
335.text: The peddlers nonchalantly mention the gold elemental to the west, but they seem excited about the trial happening in the northeast. You may pay $5 to gain a compass ([b]Item 968[/b]), $6 to gain a pickaxe ([b]Item 896[/b]), or $7 to gain a flare gun ([b]Item 961[/b]). You may also sell up to 2 items to the vendors at their listed value.

336.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the caravan to help you cross over to them (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
336.text: A few riders break off from the group and exchange words with you before slinging a harpoon across the gap. You may use the attached rope to cross the divide (go north to [b]Location 341[/b] and gain 1 morale) or cut the harpoon free (gain item [b]Item 959[/b]; you may not move north from this location).

337.text: It takes a while, but you eventually convince the transport to let you hitch a ride north past the majestic monument. Gain 1 boost and go to city [b]Location 529[/b].

338.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the doorman to let you in (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
338.text: The well-dressed doorman leads you to a side room, points out the extract in the fancy vase, and leaves you alone there. Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 570[/b].

339.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to look the other way as you borrow the artifact (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
339.text: The guard feigns distraction as you pick up the artifact and stroll away. However, the utility of the artifact eludes you. If you pay 4 boost, your attempts to use the artifact are successful (gain item [b]Item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: It’s lonely standing here all day, and you appeal to the sentinel’s desire for companionship. They share that they miss the days of training for this job, as at least then they could chat with other sentinels. Now they just stand here all day waiting for anyone with the password. Eventually they let you pass, and they look forward to seeing you again. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 094[/b].

340.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
340.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to a glass orb on [b]Location 503[/b], northeast to a gleeful sentient on [b]Location 505[/b], or southwest to a molten elemental on [b]Location 446[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

341.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] into the Gold Emblem in the presence of the judges (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
341.text: Place cards [b]Location 792[/b], [b]Location 793[/b], and [b]Location 794[/b] on the table, then begin the Trial of Negotiation. The gold leader gestures to their merchant companions, introducing them as Minic, Bastia, and Lak. Starting with only a simple sprocket (a red token), you must trade your way into the Gold Emblem in Lak’s possession. You may perform one of the two trade options in each section, and only once (a “trade” is converting 1 or more tokens into 1 or more tokens). After completing trades with a merchant, you may not return to that merchant for other trades (in this way, you will first trade with Minic, then Bastia, then Lak). Afterwards, see entry [b]Location 341[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

342.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] either the Traveler or a ferry

choices.option: Hail the Traveler for advice about escaping the planet
choices.outcome: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not make a life for yourself in a city like this?” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1601[/b].

choices.option: Hail the ferry for a ride into the city
choices.outcome: The ferry operator drops you off at the city gates. They recommend the husk shop and the broker. Gain 1 boost and go to city [b]Location 529[/b].

343.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
343.text: The contractor offers their services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino ([b]Item 1271[/b]), well ([b]Item 1275[/b]), theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]), tavern ([b]Item 1277[/b]), school ([b]Item 1280[/b]), or training grounds ([b]Item 1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

344.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
344.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride to your choice of a runecaster far to the east (go to location [b]Location 246[/b]) or the city on the far shore a little west of here (go to city [b]Location 529[/b]).
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

345.text: The cowardly poachers move on while you tend to the animal they shot, which limps along beside you. Gain animal [b]Item 836[/b].

346.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the front door
346.text: The lock is crusted with rust, but it eventually opens. Go to interior [b]Location 076[/b].

347.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about the lotus
347.text: The Traveler shakes their head as they talk about the lotus. “This is an incredible gift of nature, capable of purifying your soul with even the slightest whiff. But some wind sentients—like those in the tower to the west—have found a way to harvest and brew lotus pollen into a powerfully addictive drug. I don’t recommend using it, though. If you’re seeking connection, you’re better off finding a crewmate.” Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

348.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. They’re not available to travel with you, but they offer a package of food (gain 1 health) and some moral support (gain 1 morale).

349.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
349.text: The Traveler grows somber at the prospect of your departure. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage directly to the east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

035.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

350.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] into the cave to see if anyone responds
350.text: All you can hear is a hum and occasional “zap” sounds. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; you may continue.

351.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

352.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to the sentient while they fish
352.text: You share your limited experience with fishing on a distant ocean planet, and the quiet sentient soon opens up. They talk about their love of fishing, which they think you could learn quickly. They also mention that the hovering technology above the water is called a “runecaster,” and by pushing it you can increase your efficiency temporarily. It doesn’t help much with fishing, though. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [a84fc0]1 look[-]; you may continue.

353.text: Choose a sentient with whom to speak about the tower:

choices.outcome: A wiry sentient is fiddling with a panel at the base of the tower. They explain in a patronizing tone that the tower is designed to change the weather of this area to something more palatable for their people. It isn’t quite working as they’d hoped, though. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

A stump-like sentient is protesting against the tower, saying that the circuit sentients’ aggressive expansion is hurting the warm-weather people of the world. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

354.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

355.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
355.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. But first, I recommend syncing with the nutritional system of the wreckage.” If you pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-], gain 3 health. Also gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

356.text: A passing sentient raves about the efficiency of the waterfighters to the east and the quiet inlet to the west. But north? Unless you want to get swallowed by a sea centipede, they recommend traveling elsewhere. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-].

357.text: The animal seems drawn to those in need, so you pretend to sob. Moments later, the animal is nuzzling against you with its warm, fuzzy palpus. Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b].

358.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the leader with a deep bow
358.text: The sentient introduces themselves as Ember. They are curious how you came to this place and whether this world resembles yours. You reply that there are volcanoes and archipelagos on your home planet too. This both impresses and baffles the sentient, as you “don’t carry the fire.” If you have a torch, prove otherwise and gain item [b]Item 1241[/b] and 1 boost; also, if you have it, lose the fire curse. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

359.text: The sentient is happy to have the company, as they’ve been fishing constantly for the last week with little to show of their efforts. “Regardless,” they say, “patience and persistence!” as if it’s a familiar saying among their people. They toss you a spare fishing rod and invite you to join them. Gain item [b]Item 921[/b]; you may continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FISH[/b][-] action.

036.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

360.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
360.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory ([b]Item 1267[/b]), apothecary ([b]Item 1268[/b]), blacksmith ([b]Item 1269[/b]), tailor ([b]Item 1278[/b]), shipyard ([b]Item 1282[/b]), or market ([b]Item 1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

361.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1317[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

362.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

363.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
363.text: “If you’re trying to collect a menagerie of local fauna, follow the bubbles to a rare fish that can provide you with oxygen underwater. Please don’t harm it.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

364.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1358[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

365.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from any passing boat
365.text: You’re hard to spot in the angry sea, but a keen-eyed fisherman hauls you onto the deck and suggests you head south away from the storm. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: The fisherman agrees to venture north onto the ocean surface with you on board (go to [b]Location 063[/b]).

The fisherman is happy to transport you southeast to the Traveler on [b]Location 507[/b], south to a tower peeking out of the ocean on [b]Location 506[/b], or southwest to a gold sentient on [b]Location 505[/b].

366.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

367.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 924[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

368.text: A flat-bottom boat drifts over to you, and the captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sailor warns you about the elemental to the northwest. Gain 1 boost.

Gain 1 boost, and you may go northwest under the ocean to [b]Location 655[/b] (ignore hypoxia damage upon arrival), northeast to a talkative tree on [b]Location 666[/b], southeast to a glowing marsh on [b]Location 245[/b], or southwest to a defenseless animal on [b]Location 508[/b].

Gain 2 boost and go northwest onto the ocean surface to [b]Location 060[/b] or stay in shallow waters (go northeast to a talkative tree on [b]Location 666[/b], southeast to a glowing marsh on [b]Location 245[/b], or southwest to a defenseless animal on [b]Location 508[/b]).

369.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

037.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

370.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

371.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

372.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] other sentients gathered at the water’s edge
372.text: Other travelers return the greeting, a few of them grumbling about how they’re unable to hop from one green lilypad to the next—apparently this is the only way to safely cross the creek. Gain either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

373.text: The mammoth pauses its grooming to learn more about its new friend. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

374.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the sound of the animal’s constant chittering
374.text: The creature halts its advance, curious and confused by your mimicry. It chitters back and quickly warms to you. Gain animal [b]Item 838[/b].

375.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
375.text: The young couple aboard the ship is happy for the company. You may hitch a ride northwest to an old fort on [b]Location 304[/b], northeast to some lava-covered lorestones on [b]Location 125[/b], southeast to a burning building on [b]Location 357[/b], or southwest to a piece of your spaceship’s wreckage on [b]Location 355[/b].

376.text: The owner of the building offers to hatch an egg for you. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Hatch the egg and gain 1 morale.

choices.option: If you don’t have an egg
choices.outcome: The sentient describes the heat required to accelerate the hatching process. Gain 1 boost.

choices.option: If you want to buy the building
choices.outcome: The sentient wasn’t planning to sell their home workshop, but they’re willing to part ways with it for $35. If you pay, gain items [b]Item 860[/b], [b]Item 870[/b], and [b]Item 978[/b], and structure [b]Item 1691[/b]. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost.

377.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

378.text: The merchants are fiercely competitive, so once you choose one, the others ignore you. Pay $3 to gain one of the following: an explosive ([b]Item 879[/b]), a shovel ([b]Item 900[/b]), armor ([b]Item 946[/b]), a red flower ([b]Item 1069[/b]), an orange crystal ([b]Item 1162[/b]), or a runecaster map ([b]Item 1255[/b]). If you don’t pay, they toss you $1 in pity.

379.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

038.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

380.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] to the animal in a soothing voice
380.text: The creature can barely turn its head to acknowledge you, but its whimpers tell you that it hears you. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and continue.

381.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] an underwater ride from the turtle
381.text: The sea turtle taxi can safely transport you underwater for a fee. Choose one:

choices.option: Lose 1 boost from a flora or food card (or lose the card itself)
choices.outcome: The turtle nibbles on it and gestures for you to board the vessel. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then dive underwater either northeast to [b]Location 632[/b] or east to [b]Location 631[/b].
The turtle shrugs and waits for the next passenger. Gain 1 boost.

382.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

383.text: The sentient timidly emerges from behind the tree, apologizing for their hesitation. “I run the lighthouse to the east, so I… I don’t often see people face to face. I come down here sometimes to relax in the hammock and smell these fragrant flowers. Would you like one?” Gain flora [b]Item 1068[/b].

384.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1214[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, the chest clamps onto your fingers and won’t let go (end your turn).

385.action: [fd8c46]WHISPER[-] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
385.text: The sentient says that these ruins were once a great hall for sentients to gather and celebrate the changing seasons. Now it’s just a place for weary adventurers to hang their hats for the night. Gain 1 boost and continue.

386.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

387.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a sentient to build a structure in the valley
387.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a barn ([b]Item 1266[/b]), winery ([b]Item 1272[/b]), windmill ([b]Item 1273[/b]), stables ([b]Item 1279[/b]), hatchery ([b]Item 1285[/b]), hunting tower ([b]Item 1286[/b]), crystal mine ([b]Item 1287[/b]), garden ([b]Item 1288[/b]), or greenhouse ([b]Item 1291[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain 1 boost, $2, or ability [b]Item 1488[/b]).

388.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] for safe passage across the bridge
388.text: If you pay $2, go to [b]Location 780[/b]. If you don’t pay, the guards refuse to grant you entry (gain 1 boost and continue).

389.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] at a sentient to the east about the flowers
389.text: The stone sentient encourages you to leave the flowers alone. Gain 1 boost and continue.

039.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

390.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
390.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage to the north of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

391.action: [fd8c46]BEFRIEND[-] a fellow traveler who claims to know a secret entrance
391.text: The sentient leads you to the south and shows you an opening concealed by bushes, but they refuse to proceed without payment. If you give them $1, go southwest to [b]Location 787[/b]. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost and continue.

392.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the berries and the wall
392.text: An old sentient just around the bend seems happy to catch their breath before continuing up the path. They pop a berry in their mouth before explaining that they come to the capital city once every few days to visit the museum. Pulling a tattered map out of their pocket, they show you that the museum is part of the pavilion. Then, with a wave, they carry on their way. Gain 1 boost and view page 8 in the Book of Vantages.

393.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

394.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

395.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] some passing sentients about the objects
395.text: The objects are “repelling rods,” placed there by metal sentients, whose homeland is to the east of here. The rods annoy all other types of sentients. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

396.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to let you look through the telescope (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
396.text: You feel a surge of homesickness as you peer into the stars. With such interest in the stars, perhaps the circuit sentients could help you escape this planet. Gain 1 morale and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

397.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

398.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
398.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory ([b]Item 1267[/b]), apothecary ([b]Item 1268[/b]), blacksmith ([b]Item 1269[/b]), tailor ([b]Item 1278[/b]), shipyard ([b]Item 1282[/b]), or market ([b]Item 1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

399.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about the sentients in this area
399.text: The Traveler points to the red flags in the distance. “Wind sentients placed those flags, which they use to mark boundaries, monitor the wind, and plant seeds. Leave those flags in place. Beware the circuit sentients to the east—they will not hesitate to prove their superiority.” Gain 2 boost.

040.text: As you touch the massive crystal, you feel an instant connection with every other crystal on the planet. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1000[/b] and go to [b]Location 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.text: You yell, you dance, you even yodel to the best of your ability… and when it’s almost too late, the balloon veers off course and swings by to pick you up. The driver points in a few directions to ask your destination of choice. Gain 1 morale, and you may go northwest to a lantern-lit swamp on [b]Location 234[/b], northeast to the elemental monster on [b]Location 616[/b], southeast to a metal sentient on [b]Location 606[/b], or southwest to a treasure chest on [b]Location 199[/b].

401.text: The device isn’t compatible with your augsuit, of course, but a few adjustments allow for a smooth conversion. You’re hit with a burst of cold and an influx of data, far more than you can comprehend. You filter it by proximity and learn that there is an elemental to the east and a trial directly north of it. Gain 2 boost.

402.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
402.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino ([b]Item 1271[/b]), well ([b]Item 1275[/b]), theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]), tavern ([b]Item 1277[/b]), school ([b]Item 1280[/b]), or training grounds ([b]Item 1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you some loose change as an investment (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

403.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to let you in (you may pay $1 to decrease this cost to 0)
403.text: You convince the guard to let you into the mainframe. Go to interior [b]Location 581[/b].

404.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
404.text: The Traveler pauses to gather their thoughts. “Your spaceship may indeed be useless, but some of the vessels on this planet could be upgraded to survive the void of interstellar travel. Seek one such vessel to the northwest of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

405.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1355[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

406.text: You move close enough to shore to reach the animal, but far enough that the animal knows you have the ability to carry it away from the island. Exhausted, it eventually hops onto your shoulder. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

407.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

408.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the doorman that you seek refuge (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
408.text: The doorman lets you inside the safehouse, not asking questions, but also not letting you out of their sight as you eat a fresh meal (gain 2 health). If you pay [2694d0]1 move[-], you slip away at the first opportunity (go to interior [b]Location 559[/b]).

409.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
409.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could ally with the same circuit sentients who built these spires. They live to the far north.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

041.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with the vendors at the black market
041.text: Both patrons and sellers alike in the black market keep their identities concealed. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $8 to gain a transducer, which is often used to draw and convert fuel from energy sentients
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 948[/b].

choices.option: Share a secret in exchange for a purple extract
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 863[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

410.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the occupants of the house when they’re available

choices.option: Share a story with the sentients
choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 573[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with them to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items [b]Item 876[/b], [b]Item 909[/b], [b]Item 950[/b], and [b]Item 1164[/b], and structure [b]Item 1690[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

411.text: A small sentient with bark-like skin looks at the runestone with reverence and pride. “This is my third time along the Path, and it never gets old. It is a pilgrimage that winds throughout this area and ends here. The journey matters more than the destination—the Stone knows how many of the other 8 runes you’ve visited. You can complete this journey right now if you’d like, or head south to find the beginning of the Path and return here at the end.” Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

412.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

413.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

414.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a local sentient to restore the building
414.text: A carpenter offers their services to you for a $3 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain structure [b]Item 1286[/b].
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

415.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1337[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

416.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1193[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

417.text: The sentient is startled by your presence but not intimidated. After making small talk about the cold weather to the west, they look around and offer to lead you into the City of Shadows for $2. If you pay, go to cave [b]Location 094[/b]. Otherwise gain 1 boost.

418.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1505[/b].

419.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

042.text: A map of the world appears and uploads into your cranial implant. Gain item [b]Item 1037[/b]; the computer highlights your current location as somewhere in the northwest. Then exit to city [b]Location 041[/b].

420.text: The animal hears you but is determined to head northwest. They seem fine with the idea of you joining their pack if you tag along. You may go northwest to [b]Location 610[/b]. If you do, gain animal [b]Item 810[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

421.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animals away from the cliff
421.text: Your presence seems to snap the animals out of their stupor, and they head west. Gain 2 morale.

422.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
422.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you can use towers like the one south of here to send an SOS signal.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

423.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to finish building the structure
423.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $3 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain an armory ([b]Item 1267[/b]), apothecary ([b]Item 1268[/b]), blacksmith ([b]Item 1269[/b]), tailor ([b]Item 1278[/b]), or market ([b]Item 1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

424.text: Information pours into your cerebral implant. The device seems to be a conduit for sentients to connect with each other, not unlike the internet. You randomly click a link. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter [b]Location 503[/b], [b]Location 704[/b], or [b]Location 738[/b]. You can read but not enter new information there.

425.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1306[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

426.text: You draw upon your courage and invite the animal toward you with a steady hand. It rubs the sides of its face against your palm, leaving a slimy residue among your fingers. Gain animal [b]Item 855[/b].

427.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] at the sentient to try to draw them outside
427.text: The sentient emerges from the flora and stands so close to you that drops of sea salt spritz your face as they speak. “Is there a problem?” they ask. Choose your answer:

choices.outcome: The sentient rolls their shoulders and cracks their shell-like neck. Either [ec1c3b]overpower-◆6-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] the sentient (then gain item [b]Item 972[/b]) or surrender to them (the sentient knocks you on the head, and you come to your senses on location [b]Location 134[/b]).
The sentient re-enters the orb, saying, “I thought so. Move along.” The tide carries you west. Go to [b]Location 134[/b].

428.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

429.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the area
429.text: The passing sentient asks if you breathe oxygen, and when you confirm, they warn you about diving into the vast ocean to the east. Instead, they recommend the rolling hills to the west. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-].

043.text: The worms cower before you, slinking back inside their nest. Only one brave worm remains outside the nest; it lies down belly-up at your feet. You get the feeling that it has imprinted onto you out of some sort of survival instinct. Gain animal [b]Item 832[/b].

430.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the sea spouts. The water speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

431.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

432.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1043[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

433.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
433.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northeast to the Pearl of the Island on [b]Location 733[/b] or southeast to shipwreck wreckage on [b]Location 731[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

434.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

435.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
435.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, to the north and east there are ways to learn about time manipulation.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1608[/b] (place it in the center).

436.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1319[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

437.text: The crab-like creatures are hesitant to test the tide, but a lull gives them an opportunity. You reward them with pets and affection when they arrive, and the mother deposits a blue crystal at your feet in gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b].

438.text: The sailor is happy for the company and gives you the choice of going northwest to visit some fire sentients ([b]Location 159[/b]) or southwest to a treasure chest they passed by ([b]Location 485[/b]). Gain 1 boost, then go to your chosen location (or remain here and continue).

439.text: The sentient sighs as if they’ve answered this question before. “As I’ve told you, please align the time stones on the cover of this book to break the cycle. Look at the book to solve the puzzle.” Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

044.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the sound of a young sand centipede
044.text: It’s a small miracle that you perfectly emulate a baby centipede on your first try. The massive, blind beast is fooled by your mimicry and gently tucks you inside its cheek to take you back to the nest. Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

440.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a nearby sentient what the animals are doing
440.text: A fire sentient is happy to share that these lava flies are forging runecasters, devices designed to spread the power of runes throughout the world. They explain that lava flies aren’t inherently creative, but if you assign them a repetitive task with the reward of food, they will complete it. Gain 2 boost, or pay 1 boost to continue.

441.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

442.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

443.text: The creature whimpers and scuttles away into the night. Gain 1 morale.

444.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal into showing you the source of its pain
444.text: The spindly beast is hesitant to reveal its vulnerability, but after some gentle encouragement it reveals a puncture in its abdomen. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-] and continue.

445.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
445.text: “If you’re trying to rid the world of a greedy elemental, this is your chance—your target is directly north of here. Prepare yourself well if you plan to slay the monster.” Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

446.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

447.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
447.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a cartographer ([b]Item 1270[/b]), embassy ([b]Item 1274[/b]), tower ([b]Item 1281[/b]), or outpost ([b]Item 1292[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

448.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 977[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 908[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

449.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient what they’re looking for
449.text: Mildly annoyed by the distraction, the sentient says that they’re monitoring the waves for an impending invasion from the depths. They’re not fond of the water, so they request that you venture to the northwest to break a friend of theirs out of an underwater prison. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1639[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

045.text: With a series of taps on the tail, the sentient guides the sand centipede to set them down on the ground. The rider offers a free ride back up to the surface. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale and go to your choice of a snow field ([b]Location 221[/b]), a desert ([b]Location 441[/b]), or a forest ([b]Location 667[/b]).
The sentient wishes you luck and recommends the clear passage to the west. Gain 1 boost.

450.text: A leaf sentient comes dashing out of the forest, eager to assist you. They steer you away from the dangerous depths, encouraging you to enter the forest instead. You may go east to [b]Location 676[/b].

451.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentients to let you join them (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
451.text: The sentients confer briefly while sizing you up, then the bigger of the two signals for you to follow. Gain sentient [b]Item 1357[/b].

452.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

453.action: [fd8c46]INTERACT[-] with the building or the orb

choices.option: Interact with the people inside the building
choices.outcome: The occupants offer to sell you some heavy armor ([b]Item 976[/b]) for $5 or a battery pack ([b]Item 874[/b]) for $7. They also recommend the views from the tower of roots to the east.
The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

454.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1359[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

455.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the gatekeeper to look the other way while you enter the city (you may pay $1 to decrease this cost to 0)
455.text: The gruff sentient shrugs and points you through the gate (go northeast to [b]Location 762[/b]). If you didn’t pay any coins for this action, gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b].

456.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] of your exploits to the building’s occupants
456.text: Tickled by your tall tales, the pirates toast you with a frothing mug of ale. Choose one:

choices.outcome: When the pirates pass out, go to interior [b]Location 576[/b].

choices.option: You keep pace with the pirates
choices.outcome: The pirates start chanting, “One of us! One of us!” Soon you’re playing cards with them and having a rowdy good time. Gain 1 morale, then find card [b]Location 798[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table, and follow its instructions.Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

457.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 942[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

458.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

459.action: [fd8c46]LINK[-] to the ship’s nutritional system while consulting with the Traveler about escaping the planet
459.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health. The Traveler says, “What are you running back to? You could make a name for yourself on this planet!” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

046.text: Following your shout, voices in front of you echo back, pleading for help. From behind you, someone yells that they’re heading your way. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and continue.

460.text: The workers appreciate the break, and when your performance ends, they invite you to join them for a midday ale. There’s talk of pirates to the south and war to the west. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

461.text: The fragile creature lands on your outstretched arm, gingerly folding its wings. You make it feel safe with you, secure from the predators that roam these lands until it can heal. Gain animal [b]Item 823[/b].

462.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] to the sentient of your skills
462.text: You’re not exactly sure what will impress the sentient or even why you care so much about impressing them, but at least one of your characteristics intrigues them. They invite you to slay the wind elemental to the north with them. Gain sentient [b]Item 1311[/b].

463.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

464.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with the sentients inside the building
464.text: If you pay $6 (or cards in your grid/reserve with total value $6 or greater), the sentient sells you a map of the world’s elementals (gain item [b]Item 1262[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location [view page 19 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region H]). They also recommend a visit to the ruins of an ancient shelter to the east (gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]).

465.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] at a sentient on the other side of the canyon to the south
465.text: The sentient is too far away to shout back with any clarity, but you can see that they’re gesturing aggressively to the east and west. Gain 1 boost and continue.

466.action: [fd8c46]INTIMIDATE[-] anyone who might be waiting on the other side of the gap
466.text: Your tactic seems to work, as you hear footsteps heading east and west. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 467[/b].

467.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 7 skill dice; you may reroll any/all dice up to 2 times. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1037[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

468.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

469.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1313[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

047.action: [fd8c46]LURE[-] the sand centipede into a sharp rock using yourself as bait
047.text: The pair of hunters watch in awe as you risk your health for them. They share that their crew is short one member, and they invite you to join them. If you accept, gain sentient [b]Item 1333[/b] (the other sentient scouts ahead).

470.text: The closest beast ambles over to you, intrigued by such a familiar sound coming from such an unfamiliar creature. Gain animal [b]Item 821[/b].

471.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll any/all dice up to 2 times. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 857[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

472.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
472.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage directly to the southeast of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

473.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Leaves recommends the photosynthesis salon and the florist. Gain 2 boost.

474.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1351[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

475.text: The tiny creature’s head swivels back and forth between you and the larger beast in the background. It must have received an imperceptible signal from its parent, as it soon joins you. Gain animal [b]Item 831[/b].

476.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with the occupant of the building
476.text: After mentioning that there are opportunities for commerce in the city to the northeast (gain 1 boost), the sentient offers to buy one of your possessions (a card in your grid or reserve), paying $2 more than its value. Afterwards, they offer you the chance to either pay $1 to learn a basic magic lesson (gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b]) or pay $2 to gain a water pouch ([b]Item 858[/b]).

477.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
477.text: The Traveler is devastated by your question. “Why leave this island paradise? I’m trapped here, but at least you have a choice. There’s a perfectly good home for you just north of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1352[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

479.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient what they’re looking for
479.text: Startled by your presence, the sentient raises their weapon defensively before seeing that you’re not a threat. They’re an elite member of the coast guard assigned to patrol this area for pirates trying to steal the Pearl of the Island. The sentient is actually heading northwest toward the Pearl now. If you want to head that way, gain sentient [b]Item 1358[/b] and go to [b]Location 743[/b]; otherwise gain item [b]Item 940[/b] to help you watch for threats.

048.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

480.text: “These runes are ancient and naturally occurring, as far as we know. In recent years, sentients have experimented with runes on technology, but it makes me sick to think that someone would brand a helpless animal with a tattoo like this. There is still hope for healing, though—can you help?” Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

481.text: A group of sentients is packed onto a rocky outcropping to the east. They share that the volcano has destroyed their city, and they need your help. Gain 2 boost and continue.

482.text: The sentients share that the volcanic eruption has forced them from their homes, and they have nowhere to go. They beg you to stay and rebuild with them. Gain item [b]Item 1295[/b].

483.text: You join the critter on its little island and pet it reassuringly. It’s still scared, but at least it stops pacing. Gain any 2 skills; you may continue.

484.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

485.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1089[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

486.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
486.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, with enough time and effort you could eventually upgrade a boat like this into a functional spaceship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center).

487.text: Without hesitation, a strong sentient hoists you on their shoulders and tosses you across the gap. Go to [b]Location 276[/b].

488.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 983[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

489.text: The closest creature flaps over to you, tentative but curious. Gain animal [b]Item 826[/b].

049.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

490.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

491.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

492.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
492.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could expedite the rescue process by sending a signal from the tower to the north.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

493.text: The creature is curious about you, and you feel a pleasant sensation as it nuzzles against you. It brays appreciatively as you rub its belly. Gain animal [b]Item 822[/b].

494.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1083[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

495.text: An enterprising sentient has set up a service for those wanting to cross the gap or descend to the valley. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may go east to a snow-covered lotus on [b]Location 496[/b] or north to a vibrant pink flower on [b]Location 354[/b].
The sentient pays you $2 to keep a lookout during their next descent.

496.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

497.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] some dockside workers while they work
497.text: The workers appreciate a break in the monotony of loading and unloading ships. When you’re done, they toss you some coins and invite you to relax inside. Gain $4 and go to interior [b]Location 578[/b].

498.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

499.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the occupants of the house when they’re available
499.text: When you’re within earshot, choose one:

choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 579[/b].

choices.option: Negotiate with them to buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items [b]Item 900[/b], [b]Item 982[/b], and [b]Item 993[/b], and structure [b]Item 1687[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

050.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the cave. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

500.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

501.text: The lava burns as you make your way over to the device. Suffer 1 heat damage. A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1306[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

502.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock while the Traveler talks to you
502.text: “It has always seemed strange to me that such valuables would be stored in public treasure chests. The explanation I’ve heard is that certain generous sentients want to add a little hope and mystery to the world.” Gain 1 boost and proceed to pick the lock. With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1036[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

503.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

504.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] the pirate ship after their conquest is complete
504.text: The pirates usher you aboard their fine vessel. Choose one:

choices.option: Charm the pirates into letting you join the crew as they sail west toward a treasure chest
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 502[/b] and gain [fff349]1 take[-].

Either sell the pirates a card from your grid, reserve, or supply (lose the card and gain its value), buy a rare, contraband flora from the pirates (pay $15 to gain flora [b]Item 1070[/b]), or accept a free barrel of juice the pirates mistook for ale during a recent raid (gain item [b]Item 1158[/b]).

choices.option: Pay $40 to take ownership of the pirate ship
choices.outcome: Gain vehicle [b]Item 1017[/b] and item [b]Item 1260[/b]; the first mate highlights your current location (view page 17 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region D).

505.text: The gold sentient splashes some water at you and laughs. Seeing your bewilderment, they mention that they closed a major deal today and wanted to celebrate with a dip in the ocean. They have time to spare, so you can choose to either gain sentient [b]Item 1320[/b] or duel the sentient in their favorite card and dice game (find card [b]Location 798[/b] [it’s a large card, place it on the table, and follow its instructions]).Variant: Quick Skirm (ignore card 798).

506.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

507.text: A skiff catches the wind and sails over to you, but the captain won’t steer north because they can “feel a storm a-brewin.’” Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then you may go northwest to the churning ocean’s edge on [b]Location 365[/b], northeast to a treasure chest on [b]Location 367[/b], southeast to a shimmering skyline on [b]Location 344[/b], or southwest to a bustling city on [b]Location 342[/b].
The captain warns you of those who live under the sea (gain 1 boost).

508.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the poachers to leave the animal alone (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
508.text: The poachers sail away to less controversial targets. Gain animal [b]Item 847[/b].

509.action: [fd8c46]LINK[-] to the ship’s nutritional system while chatting with the Traveler
