509.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. As you do, the Traveler talks about a secret island to the somewhat distant northwest. Gain 2 health and 1 boost.

510.text: Your request startles the sentient, though they quickly gather their composure. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, learning of their growing concern about the elemental to the west
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, then exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 to buy the water pouch
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 858[/b], then exit to [b]Location 476[/b].
Gain item [b]Item 1045[/b], then exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

choices.option: Pay $6 to buy the jet pack
choices.outcome: Gain vehicle [b]Item 1253[/b], then exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

511.text: The pesky creature cackles with glee at your stern words, their laughter coming from across the creek, though all you can see is a pair of boots. Gain 1 boost and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]SOLVE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the island. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

513.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient why they’re trapped here
513.text: “Trapped?” they reply. “I’m not trapped—I’m here by choice! Energy is my gift to the world—or, at least, this part of the world.” The sentient bestows upon you the knowledge to share and create energy; gain lesson [b]Item 1427[/b].

514.text: These lorestones aren’t etched with familiar runes—there’s something both ancient and futuristic to the leylines that run through them, and you’re compelled to take some of this power for yourself. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

515.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] a sentient who emerges from the gateway
515.text: A tan sentient in a flowing cape steps forward, their attention on their pocket watch as they cross the barrier. At your greeting, they look up, though they don’t seem all that surprised. They explain that they regularly monitor this time rift, the far side of which has consistently remained 100 years in the future from what you consider the present. Gain sentient [b]Item 1344[/b] and continue.

516.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the towering tree. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

517.text: The smelter—now 100 years older than the last time you saw them—wipes their wide brow. “It’s about time you showed up!” they say with a hearty laugh. They ease down the stairs on their old legs. “This is quite a ship you have here, and I’m honored to have made it my life’s work. I made a few modifications—there’s basically a small active volcano powering the thrusters.” They pause, and you can tell they have a request that they’re hesitant to make. You speak up first to remove the awkwardness. “Ash, would you like to come with us? We could use a smelter like you among the crew.” The old sentient looks up with disbelief and envelops you in a huge hug. “It would be my great honor.” Gain vehicle [b]Item 1033[/b] and sentient [b]Item 1316[/b].

518.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with a vendor at the trading post
518.text: The vendor at the trading post explains that wind sentients traditionally don’t believe in money as currency. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Exchange something of value to gain a crystal
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a noted value from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain item [b]Item 1160[/b].

choices.option: Exchange something of value to gain a pet fish
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a noted value from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain animal [b]Item 806[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

519.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] with patrons at a local tavern
519.text: Tipsy wood sentients sip on a sap-like beverage in the local tavern. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Scoot your chair over to a wizened, half-blind sentient
choices.outcome: The old sentient repays your kindness by sharing a way to tap into greater potential: Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

052.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the passing sailboat
052.text: The boat is crowded with small sentients, but they make room for you. They present you with a few options for destinations. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 058[/b].

choices.option: Go northwest to a remote island cottage
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 476[/b].

choices.option: Go northeast to an industrial building
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 453[/b].
Go to [b]Location 368[/b].

choices.option: Go southwest to the ocean shallows
choices.outcome: Go to [b]Location 362[/b].

520.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] with some sentients at a local cafe
520.text: The cafe is mostly empty, save a sentient busily transcribing a manuscript into a book. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient marks their page and joins you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1326[/b].

choices.option: Pay $1 for a cup of herbal tea
choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.

choices.option: Learn some communication tactics from the translator
choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1470[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

521.text: The owner of the crystal shop is protective of their wares—it’s clear that they are valuable to circuit sentients. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain your choice of one crystal: blue ([b]Item 1160[/b]), purple ([b]Item 1161[/b]), orange ([b]Item 1162[/b]), green ([b]Item 1163[/b]), yellow ([b]Item 1164[/b]), or red ([b]Item 1165[/b]).
Lose a crystal card to gain $10.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

522.text: The pawn shop is full of unwanted items. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 898[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

523.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with a climbing gear supply store
523.text: The climbing gear supply is well stocked with items for both ascending and descending. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $4 for gear designed for ascending
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 914[/b].

choices.option: Pay $2 for some gear for descending
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 909[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

524.text: The bone vendor offers an array of animal bones of all shapes and sizes, informing you that sinew sentients wear skeletons to provide structure to their muscular frames. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Sell an animal to the vendor (lose 1 animal from your grid or reserve)
choices.outcome: Gain $10 and lose 1 morale as you worry about what will happen to the animal.

choices.option: Pay $1 for a simple bone carving
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

525.text: If you’re looking for a torch, you’ve come to the right place. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1085[/b].

choices.option: Persuade the shopkeeper to give you a torch
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and gain item [b]Item 1085[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

526.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] with patrons at the photosynthesis salon
526.text: Sunbathing patrons at the photosynthesis salon chat with each other with their eyes closed. Choose one:

choices.option: Laugh with the other sentients as you relax in the sun
choices.outcome: Roll 2 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each [0b955e]help[-] result, then gain 1 health.
It doesn’t take much to get the sunbathers to chat about topics ranging from their favorite runes to how they earned their petals to their latest philanthropic efforts. Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Cajole a sentient to give you a flower
choices.outcome: Gain flora [b]Item 1064[/b].
Gain sentient [b]Item 1354[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

527.action: [fd8c46]TALK[-] with tipsy patrons at the tiki bar
527.text: Everyone is in a festive mood at the tiki bar. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $1 for a drink for yourself
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Pay $5 for a round of drinks
choices.outcome: Gain sentient [b]Item 1364[/b] and 2 morale.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

528.text: The store owner welcomes you inside their air supply dome. The shelves are stocked for air-breathing lungs like yours. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Sell some oxygen from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage)
choices.outcome: Gain $6.
Gain item [b]Item 1212[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to gain an oxygen mask
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 964[/b].
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

529.text: The broker is looking for a good deal. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Lose any 1 card with a coin value from your grid, reserve, or supply
choices.outcome: Gain that card’s value +$1.

choices.option: Lose any 2 cards with coin values from your grid, reserve, or supply
choices.outcome: Gain their combined value +$4.

530.text: A host eagerly ushers you inside their casino. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Play a casino game called “Perfecto” with the sentients (bet up to $6)
choices.outcome: Roll 6 skill dice up to 6 times (roll any/all dice each time). If the final results are all identical, gain double the amount you bet. Otherwise, lose your bet.

choices.option: Play a push-your-luck game called “Pinch” with the sentients (pay $1 to play)
choices.outcome: Roll 6 skill dice. If the results include at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-], gain $2. You may stop and keep your winnings or proceed to roll 5 skill dice. If the results include at least [fd8c46]1 engage[-], gain $2 and you may continue with another roll (1 fewer die each round); if not, lose the $2 earned on the previous roll and end the game.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

531.text: The lanky kid behind the counter says that they’re buying and selling sand centipede bait, among other items. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.outcome: Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

choices.option: Lose 1 animal from your grid or reserve
choices.outcome: Gain the animal’s value +$4 and lose 1 morale.
Lose up to 2 cards from your grid, reserve, or supply to gain their coin value.

054.text: A consortium of merchants welcomes you aboard with open arms… if you have coins to spare. You may lose 1 card to gain its value. Then, if you have at least $1, continue reading. Otherwise the merchants throw you overboard (go to [b]Location 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival).

choices.outcome: One merchant offers you information (pay $1 to gain 2 boost); another raves about a seaweed smoothie (pay $1 to gain 1 health); yet another peddles a warm sticky bun (pay $1 to gain 1 morale). You may choose any/all of them if you can afford it (if you buy anything, then go to [b]Location 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival), or you can ignore them and listen to some more elite merchants at the upper tiers of the ship (decide to buy or proceed before reading further).

As you ascend higher into the ship, a toothy vendor offers to sell you a steel fox (pay $3 to gain animal [b]Item 828[/b]) or a gossamer spider (pay $3 to gain animal [b]Item 819[/b]); a willowy sentient also tries to open your purse with offers to sell you the rare drakeleaf (pay $5 to gain flora [b]Item 1081[/b]) or a maelstrom agave (pay $6 to gain flora [b]Item 1046[/b]). You may choose any/all of them if you can afford it (if you buy anything, then go to [b]Location 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival), or you can ignore these offers too and go to the very top of the ship for one final offer from the captain (decide whether to buy or proceed before reading further).

As you reach the bridge, an old sentient welcomes you and reveals that they are hoping to retire. “Years ago, I converted an old galleon to this roving market. I think it’s time to ground the market, but the ship is yours for $30.” If you accept, gain vehicle [b]Item 1016[/b], then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 063[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 058[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 478[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 451[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 366[/b]); or [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 426[/b]). If not, the captain wishes you well and pushes you off the ship (go to [b]Location 647[/b], ignoring hypoxia damage upon arrival).

541.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with a hidden occupant of the ruins for an item
541.text: A shy sentient emerges from behind a pillar. Choose one:

choices.option: Spend a few minutes chatting with the sentient, making them feel seen
choices.outcome: Gain 1 morale. You may also sell them 1 card to gain its value (lose the item).
Gain item [b]Item 1085[/b].

choices.option: Pay $5 to buy a jar of adhesive
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 866[/b].
Gain item [b]Item 971[/b].

542.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the treasure chest
542.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1040[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

543.text: In an instant, a mob of sinew sentients swarm you and rush you to a secret room full of bones. Find card [b]Location 800[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. These bones formed the armor for countless legends among the sinew sentients, with each legend making a unique mark on the bones. The first legend always made an angular mark with something in common. The second legend always made a mark of a circle in a certain position. The third legend… well, that’s for you to decipher. You’re presented with 3 piles of bones. The first pile is of true bones that follow the rules for each legend and for all 3 legends together. The second pile contains false bones that don’t follow some of the rules. The goal is to identify the only bone in the third pile that follows all the rules. See entry [b]Location 543[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.
