601.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

602.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1090[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

603.text: The skittish animal isn’t easily convinced, but it’s intrigued by the wiring of your augsuit. Gain animal [b]Item 820[/b].

604.text: The sentient pauses, their shoulders slumped, their eyes on the snow. “No,” they reply, “I’m not okay. But… I don’t want to talk about it. Not yet.” You assure them that you won’t ask again, yet you have the feeling that they could use some company. You may spend 1 morale to gain sentient [b]Item 1312[/b] and go west to [b]Location 603[/b], or you may continue.

605.text: The hunters are easily amused, and they’re soon singing along to music they’ve never heard before. Afterwards they invite you to join them by the fire for a meal. Regain any health lost from the cold on this location, then gain 1 morale and continue.

606.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient into letting you pass (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
606.text: The sentient points you to the cave they’re guarding (go to cave [b]Location 021[/b]).

607.text: Without fear, they amble toward you and smell your hand. Heat radiates from its small body. Gain 2 health and continue.

608.text: Information pours into your implant. It seems to be a way for sentients to connect with each other, not unlike the internet. You randomly click a link. Visit orb.stonemaiergames.com and enter [b]Location 244[/b], [b]Location 618[/b], or [b]Location 704[/b].

609.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1215[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1163[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

610.text: The creature grunts back as if to say, “We’re good.” You can either hitch a ride on it and enjoy the view as it transports you to the cold-but-clear southwest (gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and go to [b]Location 604[/b], ignoring cold damage upon arrival) or just enjoy the camaraderie (gain 1 morale and 1 health).

611.text: “I can’t confirm that the legend is true—I suspect this area would be frozen with or without a magical shard. However, there is magic within the obelisk if you look hard enough.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

612.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
612.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a castle ([b]Item 1265[/b]), cabin ([b]Item 1283[/b]), cottage ([b]Item 1289[/b]), or air supply dome ([b]Item 1290[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

613.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, but then a door opens in the nearby building. You may go to interior [b]Location 580[/b].

614.text: The sentient chuckles, saying that the legends are fantastic stories—though in this case they also happen to be true. To demonstrate, they extend the gift of vision to you. Gain lesson [b]Item 1426[/b].

615.text: “A long time ago, the circuit, fire, and metal sentients worked together to harness the power of the runes found organically across this world. The result of their collaboration is runecasters like this one, which appears to have been in the process of charging.” Gain 2 boost.

616.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind—preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

617.text: Plugging your augsuit into the tall circuit board, you’re flooded with information about cities of the world. Gain item [b]Item 1193[/b].

618.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] of your accomplishments to the masked entities
618.text: Choose one characteristic to boast about:

choices.outcome: The masks challenge you to head northwest to the Trial of Memory. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

The masks are particularly intrigued by your ability to stay connected to your crew via wireless technology. Gain 1 morale. They offer you their assistance in departing this planet if you help them untether. If you agree, gain destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center). The circuit sentients direct you to the northeast, where you can find vehicles that push the limits of their technology.
The masks challenge you to head west to prove your strength against an infamous circuit elemental. Gain 1 health and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

619.text: The sentient has a number of questions about who you are and how you came to this planet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient pays well for the information, though you have immediate concerns of how it may be misused. Lose 1 morale and gain $8.
Disappointed, the sentient returns to their task. Refresh up to 1 challenge die from your grid and continue.

620.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the sentient in a gentle tone
620.text: After hearing only a few words in your language, the sentient is able to comprehend and respond. “Help me,” they say. “The circuit sentients have trapped me here.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

621.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
621.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]MEMORIZE[/b][-] action.

622.text: Maintaining eye contact, you connect one of the main cords extending from the sentient with your augsuit. Their expression changes to one of joy as they receive a wave of data about you—the connection is immediate. “Welcome, dear friend,” they say. “I hope you’ll stay for a while, perhaps in the City of Spires to the north? Or attempt the Trial of Memory to the west?” Gain 2 boost and continue.

623.text: Despite the Traveler’s warning, you interact with the hologram. It howls with glee. “Now you must answer my riddle! How many orange circles do you see in my ivy grove? Choose a number:

choices.outcome: The hologram bows to you respectfully; gain lesson [b]Item 1421[/b].
The hologram pities you; gain 1 boost.
The hologram bows to you respectfully; gain lesson [b]Item 1421[/b].
The hologram pities you; gain 1 boost.

624.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the light. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

625.action: [fd8c46]SYNC[-] to the crystal by connecting a wire to your augsuit
625.text: You instantly have your first tangible, tactile experience with your soul, which until this point you had never really thought about. But you can feel it now just as well as you can feel your own skin. You also gain a sense that there’s an even more powerful possibility. Gain 2 morale and quest [b]Item 1663[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

626.text: A departing sentient entertains your offer to exchange information. You answer their question about what lies beyond this planet, and they inform you that the easiest way inside is to extract a loose panel. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

627.text: A sentient headed out of the City of Spires recommends the hackerspace and the memory uploader. They’re surprised that your fragile frame is able to withstand the cold temperatures here; they urge you to get out of the cold by heading north. Gain 2 boost; you may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]BALANCE[/b][-] action.

628.text: A proud farmer shaves off a sample for you; gain item [b]Item 1161[/b] and continue.

629.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal to lay down on the snow
629.text: The creature has no energy to resist, and it gently unfolds on the ground before you. You pet one of its necks, and it hums with appreciation. Gain 1 morale and continue.

630.text: Seemingly acting of its own accord, the vehicle responds to your plea and lands gently in the snow. It provides a few destination options down into the valley a few clicks to the north: Gain 1 boost and you may go northwest to an ancient bridge on [b]Location 495[/b], north to a snow-covered lotus on [b]Location 496[/b], or northeast to a warehouse on [b]Location 497[/b].

631.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

632.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the weeds. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

633.text: The fish is shy, but when you start blowing bubbles, it instantly warms to you. Gain animal [b]Item 806[/b].

634.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build an underwater structure
634.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for $6. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino ([b]Item 1271[/b]), well ([b]Item 1275[/b]), theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]), tavern ([b]Item 1277[/b]), school ([b]Item 1280[/b]), or training grounds ([b]Item 1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

635.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
635.text: “If you’re trying to escape your past, you’ll need to turn off the signal I activated in my old spaceship to the north. Or you could transmit more signals to attract aid from your fleet.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

636.text: Several water sentients begrudgingly pull the sentient from the funnel, dumping them in your arms. Gain (a very thankful) sentient [b]Item 1347[/b].

637.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

638.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

639.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
639.text: “If you must leave, with enough effort you could repair your spaceship. There is wreckage to the southeast of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

640.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard that you should be on the list (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
640.text: The guard isn’t easily persuaded, especially with their companion nearby. Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b] and go either north to [b]Location 641[/b] or to interior [b]Location 582[/b].

641.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Waves recommends the armory and, after looking at you, the air supply store. Gain $1 and 2 boost.

642.text: The creature drifts over to you and opens its mouth, which is void of water and occupied by several other sentients. Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to a remote island home on [b]Location 476[/b], northeast to a hovering device on [b]Location 478[/b], southeast to an underwater arena on [b]Location 647[/b], or southwest to a deep-sea flower on [b]Location 635[/b]. Upon arrival, ignore the hypoxia damage (if any).

643.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the animals, letting your clothes flutter in the current
643.text: Your imitation delights the animals, and one of them nudges you to follow them close to the waterspout. Just as you feel the funnel pulling you in, the animal offers you a handhold and tugs you to safety. Go north to [b]Location 644[/b].

644.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

645.text: The sentient demands to know what brings you to this part of the ocean. You tell the truth—you’re an explorer from a distant planet, and you crash-landed here. Thankfully, the sentient believes you, as they’ve seen some of the wreckage to the south. They offer you a trade—a piece of your tech in exchange for theirs: If you have your starting item (gained previously through your character card’s [0b955e]EQUIP[-] action), you may lose it to gain item [b]Item 1038[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 boost. The sentient strongly suggests you travel any direction but north.

646.text: The creature is disappointed by your lack of respect, but they begrudgingly accept your offer. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient gives you directions to a mech suit. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1656[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

You tell a story to the sentient about the oceans on your home planet. The sentient appreciates the information and offers you directions to a mech suit. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1656[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
The sentient curses your insolence. Gain curse [b]Item 1385[/b] and 2 boost.

647.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
647.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] action.

648.action: [fd8c46]LURE[-] the sharks away from your desired path
648.text: On a hunch, you cut open a nearby plant, and a blood-like substance oozes out of it into the water. You swim away as the liquid sends nearby sharks into a frenzy. Gain 1 boost; you may go to any adjacent location (north is [b]Location 478[/b]).

649.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the captain’s cabin
649.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open, revealing a treasure. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 979[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1153[/b]. Otherwise, gain $6.

650.text: Your feeble attempts at underwater humor bring a smile to the sentient’s face, though they say that the real cure to their sadness is an antidote found in the possession of their leaf friend to the east. They beg you to travel into the forest and listen carefully to their friend. Gain 1 boost, [a84fc0]1 look[-], and quest [b]Item 1655[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

651.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal with a gentle gurgle
651.text: It takes incredible effort to pacify the animal, especially underwater and in front of its pod, but you eventually convince them you’re not a threat. Gain animal [b]Item 850[/b] and 1 morale.

652.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the guards to grant you entry (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
652.text: You sidle over to the nearest guard and offer them some coin compensation if they convince the others to turn their backs for a few minutes.

choices.outcome: The guard agrees, and inside the pit you find a sentient who is eager to escape with you (gain sentient [b]Item 1356[/b]).
The guard mentions that there’s a treasure chest nestled into the coral to the north. Gain 1 boost and continue.

653.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 885[/b]. Otherwise, a trap springs out of the chest, knocking the air from your lungs (suffer 1 hypoxia damage).

654.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the anemones. They speak to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

655.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build an underwater dome
655.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain structure [b]Item 1290[/b].
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

656.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a local water sentient to tell you about the cave (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
656.text: Decide whether you would like to sweeten the deal with a small payment of $1. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient gives you a pep talk about the dangerous cave. Gain either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; then refresh all challenge dice from 1 row in your grid. You may continue.
The sentient wishes you luck with the nearly indestructible barrier inside the cave; gain [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

657.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

658.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
658.text: “If you’re trying to kill an elemental, head south and resist the urge to help the monster. Or you could find a safer way to achieve legendary acclaim.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

659.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about your mission
659.text: “Water sentients like this sentry are well known for their fighting prowess. If you seek to leverage the people of this world to gain an advantage on your home planet, water sentients could make for a powerful ally. You could try to earn their respect through an ancient dueling tradition.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1603[/b] (place it in the center).

660.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal with a playful gesture
660.text: The creature responds with glee, gliding over to you while blowing bubbles. Gain animal [b]Item 848[/b].

661.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the turtle on the other side of the waterfall

choices.option: If you have flora or food
choices.outcome: The turtle nibbles on it and gestures for you to board the vessel. Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to a shoreside treasure chest on [b]Location 448[/b], northeast to a quiet ceremony on [b]Location 667[/b], southeast to a glowing device on [b]Location 246[/b], or southwest to a piece of spaceship wreckage on [b]Location 509[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have flora or food
choices.outcome: The turtle shrugs and waits for the next passenger (gain 1 boost).

662.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on a side window
662.text: You slip quietly into the lodge and immediately discover that the owners have decorated the interior with an unsettling number of bones. Go to interior [b]Location 584[/b].

663.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

664.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] a sentient who emerges from the gateway
664.text: Out of thin air, a heavily muscled sentient with a long, bony beak emerges from the gateway. They weren’t expecting anyone—they explain that they were doing their part to protect the previous portal in the network. Gain sentient [b]Item 1334[/b].

665.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the building’s owner if any homes are available
665.text: A stumpy sentient wearing a universal translator, the resident of the biggest cottage, replies that they have several vacancies among their luxury hillside condos. They offer you one for the discounted price of $29. If you pay, gain structure [b]Item 1701[/b]. If you don’t pay, the landlord subtly suggests that they wouldn’t mind if you “took care of” the elemental to the northeast, as it’s hurting the property values (gain quest [b]Item 1693[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

666.text: You introduce yourself to the tree, and the tree replies in a gnarled voice that they do not yet have a name. They were in the process of being carved into a sentient when the Carver was interrupted, and they haven’t returned. The tree begs you to find the Tools of Creation to the northeast and return here. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

667.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] the sentients with a celebratory, joyful song
667.text: The sentients turn toward the source of the noise, utterly baffled by the interruption. It would appear music is not part of their tradition. Seeing your good intentions, though, they laugh and wave you over to the foot of the bridge, over which they soon cross. One of them is rather fascinated by you and offers to join you for a short stroll before the next part of the ceremony. Gain sentient [b]Item 1362[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

668.action: [fd8c46]MIMIC[-] the animal by imitating the movement of its front claws
668.text: The creature delights in the familiar patterns and nuzzles against your hand. Gain animal [b]Item 853[/b].

669.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the mushrooms
669.text: A short sentient waddles over to inspect the fungi. “Yes yes, this is a tasty batch, I tell you. There’s a very good chance none of these are poisonous.” Gain either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

670.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the rune. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

671.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
671.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Why not settle down in this lush forest? Haven’t you always wanted to live in a treehouse? Check out Treetrunk Village to the northeast before you make any decisions you’ll regret.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

672.text: The sentient offers you a bevy of options. Choose one:Pay $4 to gain a fishing pole ([b]Item 921[/b]).Sell the sentient an item, animal, or flora (lose the card from your grid or reserve to gain its value).Exchange information to gain the company of the sentient (pay 1, 2, or 3 skills to gain sentient [b]Item 1361[/b] with 1, 2, or 3 boost on them, respectively).Gain 1 boost.

673.text: The sentient explains that they’re standing outside the shop of a local shoemaker, who is rumored to have created a pair of flying shoes. The shoemaker isn’t in their workshop right now, but they should be back soon. Gain 1 boost; you may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SNEAK[/b][-] action.

674.text: It’s difficult to catch the animal’s attention from behind it, so you run into its path. It stops and hands you a piece of fruit. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b].

675.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll any/all dice up to 2 times. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 973[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). Otherwise, gain $4.

676.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] the sentient with a little dance to cheer them up
676.text: A smile briefly appears on their face before they resume crying. Through their tears, they recommend that you check out the embassy. You may either gain 1 boost and continue, or go to interior [b]Location 585[/b].

677.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the nearby sentient about the city behind them
677.text: The sentient waiting in front of Treetrunk Village recommends the mask shop, the shipwright, and their own tavern, of course. Gain 2 boost.

678.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient about the pleasant sensation you’re feeling in this grove
678.text: The random question from a complete stranger puzzles the sentient, but they shake off the confusion and point to the torch grass growing nearby. They pluck a stalk that’s already fading, leaving the still-growing plants to flourish. Gain flora [b]Item 1060[/b].

679.action: [fd8c46]INTERACT[-] with the orb or the animal

choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

You approach the animal with caution, holding out your hand for it to smell. One of its many tendrils brushes against you. The animal seems satisfied with the result, as it teeters closer to you. Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

680.text: The animal is timid but also eager to please. Gain animal [b]Item 854[/b].

681.action: [fd8c46]LURE[-] the web’s creator by gently plucking a strand (or, if the beast is no longer a threat, choose another action)
681.text: You jump back as a huge spider-like beast skitters down the center tree. It hisses at you but doesn’t attack. Gain 1 boost and choose one (or continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action to the east, south, or west):

choices.option: [2694d0]move-◆4-[b]DASH[/b][-] through the leftmost gap in the trees
choices.outcome: Lured from its hunting perch, the spider isn’t in a position to grab you as you run past. Go north to [b]Location 686[/b].
You have the upper hand, even against such a dangerous creature. Gain item [b]Item 1164[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 686[/b] or take a [2694d0]move[-] action to go in a different direction.

682.text: The sentient at the door is joined by several others who peer out the windows. Choose one:

choices.option: Share a story with the occupants
choices.outcome: The family of sentients is eager to hear more tales of your adventure, and they invite you inside for dinner. You weave a tale that eventually puts them to sleep. Gain 1 health and go to interior [b]Location 586[/b].

choices.option: Persuade the sentients to let you buy their house and its contents (pay $35; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items [b]Item 916[/b], [b]Item 995[/b], and [b]Item 997[/b], and structure [b]Item 1689[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

683.text: The sentient stoically nods at you, gesturing for you to approach. Communicating through scent, they introduce themselves as a resident of this treetop village. They ask that, if you’re interested, you travel northeast and reactivate some ancient portals there. Gain quest [b]Item 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

684.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
684.text: Your question bewilders the Traveler. “How can you even consider leaving without your cats? I think I see them to the north of here. Then maybe you could think about building a new ship.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

685.text: The act of talking to a flower is strange but also meditative, and you feel better afterward. Gain 2 morale.

686.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure
686.text: The architect offers their services to you for a $4 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a casino ([b]Item 1271[/b]), well ([b]Item 1275[/b]), theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]), tavern ([b]Item 1277[/b]), school ([b]Item 1280[/b]), or training grounds ([b]Item 1293[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

687.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

688.text: The early days of basic training finally prove useful as you apply the fundamentals of radio signals to the tower. You tap into the tower’s system to send a quick burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

689.text: At the sound of your voice, both cats begin purring, and the sound only grows louder as they inch their way down the branches. They’re confused and disoriented but happy to see you. Gain animal [b]Item 827[/b].

choices.outcome: The portals spring to life. Four of them show glimmers of distant locations; a small altar in front of the center portal suggests that you can choose another destination in exchange for a small sacrifice. Rotate quest [b]Item 1657[/b] and add it to your grid.

You’re able to improve the accessibility of the gateways, but to activate them, some amount of sorcery is required. Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and quest [b]Item 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

691.text: A local sentient replies in a hushed, reverent tone. “This is the Heart of the Forest, the home of the Lifestone. It enables the trees in this area to become people like me, if the proper tools are used.” Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

692.text: When the animal sees your eagerness to greet them, they bound toward you and lick your cheek. You scratch behind their ears and then their belly as they roll around in the grass. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

693.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
693.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

694.action: [fd8c46]WHISPER[-] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
694.text: The sentient explains that this temple was a place of peaceful meetings among sentients. As technology developed and tensions grew, such meeting places fell out of favor. These gateways are now used as a way to exit and enter the land of the wood sentients, and travelers often leave items here for others to pick up. The last time they checked, there was even a large egg inside the ruins. Gain 2 boost and continue.

695.text: The farmer, wheezing from overexertion, explains that their entire herd broke free last night. They beg you to search the surrounding area to find them and steer them back here. Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and quest [b]Item 1702[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

696.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

697.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

698.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a local to tell you about the cave (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
698.text: The sentient wishes you luck with the puzzle trap barrier inside the cave. They also give you a pep talk about the [fff349]take[-] challenge you face inside. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

699.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a passing sentient to build a structure along the path
699.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $5 fee. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain a cartographer ([b]Item 1270[/b]), embassy ([b]Item 1274[/b]), tower ([b]Item 1281[/b]), or outpost ([b]Item 1292[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

700.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1483[/b].

701.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
701.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “If you must leave, you could use or create a portal to teleport across the galaxy. I’m wary of this particular portal, though.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1604[/b] (place it in the center).

702.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the animal from behind the lotus
702.text: Shy but curious, the animal skitters over to you. When it sees that you’re friendly, it nudges a round rock to your feet and steps back, poised to chase. You toss the rock down into the valley, and the animal gleefully trots after it. While it’s gone, you may pluck the lotus from the ledge. Read the following based on your choice.

choices.outcome: When the animal returns with the rock in its mouth and sees the lotus in your hands, it cries out in anguish. Gain flora [b]Item 1159[/b].
When the animal returns with the rock in its mouth, it’s eager to join you. Gain animal [b]Item 838[/b].

703.text: The goliath returns your deep bow with a slight nod of their head. “You can call me the King of Souls.” They explain that they are seeking to be the first to complete the trials of all 12 types of sentients, and they show you on a map that their next target is to the east. View page 18 of the Book of Vantages (the sentient indicates that their destination is the trial in region J), then gain 2 boost and continue.

704.text: The outside of the orb is a message board. You may read what other travelers have posted about this area and help other wayward travelers by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.

705.text: It doesn’t take much urging to coax the animal over to you, as it seems eager for company. Gain animal [b]Item 838[/b].

706.text: Unaccustomed to hearing this song from someone like you, all four flying whales drift toward you, the chase forgotten. One dips toward you, offering you a perch on its back. Gain animal [b]Item 840[/b].

707.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the valley. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

708.text: The sentient collapses to their knees, sobbing. In a rough voice they explain that they were spelunking to the north, but their child got stuck. If you will help, gain [2694d0]3 move[-] and go north to [b]Location 709[/b]; otherwise gain 1 boost.

709.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] to see if someone is at the other end of the rope
709.text: Sure enough, you hear a relieved voice from within the crystal column. A spelunking sentient is stuck and needs help. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

710.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

711.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
711.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of deserting this place, why not make it your home? There are ample opportunities in the capital city to the far west.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1601[/b] (place it in the center).

712.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, but then a sentient emerges from the mist. Their attention is more on you than the runecaster, though before they leave, they demonstrate that you can push a button on the device. When you do, you feel invigorated. Gain 2 skills matching the rune and continue.

713.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

714.text: The sentient pauses their cloudcrafting to talk to you in a rumbling voice. “My sibling has been taken hostage by metal sentients, most likely to the north. Please help me!” Gain 1 boost, [0b955e]1 help[-], and quest [b]Item 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to join you for a stroll (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
715.text: The sentient is hesitant to leave their post, but they admit they haven’t taken a vacation in years. Gain sentient [b]Item 1348[/b].

716.text: A beam of bright light bursts from the top of the runecaster. Nothing happens for a few minutes, then a sentient appears. “I saw your signal—how can I help?” they ask. Gain sentient [b]Item 1328[/b] with a “when placed” benefit of only 1 boost (instead of 2).

717.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the location
717.text: An old sentient pauses to dip their toes in the water. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient smiles as they enjoy the warmth of the water. “This was my favorite place to swim in my younger years. It never failed to cheer me up. And when I was feeling really adventurous, I’d swim down to the bottom, though it’s pretty deep.” Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

The sentient gently runs their hand through the leaves. “This is chalcedonic myrtle, a rare flora, even in these parts. In its raw form, it’s known to cause great mirth. But if you process the petals, they become a powerful acidic paste.” Gain either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

718.text: The sentient speaks frantically at first, but you help them focus and relax. They explain that they are a cloudtalker—they can read and even manipulate the weather. Because of their abilities, however, they were targeted for a tragic act of theft. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain sentient [b]Item 1345[/b] and quest [b]Item 1654[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).
Gain 1 boost, [a84fc0]1 look[-], and [0b955e]1 help[-].

719.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] at the hostel in case someone is still inside
719.text: At first the only sound is that of your voice echoing throughout the mountains. Then you hear a response not from the cottage but from the south; someone yells that you’re disturbing their class and that you need to quiet down. Gain 1 boost and continue.

720.text: Placing your hand on the skull, you breathe with intention, eyes closed. The animal appears in your mind, staring at you with an intense calm. Choose one:

choices.outcome: With gratitude, the animal departs into the darkness. Gain 1 morale and 1 health.
With acceptance, the animal steps forward into your mind. Gain ability [b]Item 1474[/b].

721.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
721.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]CALCULATE[/b][-] action.

722.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a local sentient if this is a safe crossing
722.text: The gray-skinned sentient not only confirms that the crossing is safe, but also explains that it is a special place to honor someone you cherish by taking a “leap of faith.” Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and continue.

723.text: You center yourself, becoming one with the lorestone. It speaks to you, revealing the next step in your journey. Roll X skill dice. Gain all skills of 1 type from the results. You may continue with an action matching the result.

724.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 936[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1165[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

725.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about the sign
725.text: A stone sentient explains that this sign marks the beginning of the Path, a pilgrimage for sentients traveling in this area. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

726.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the creature to let the sentients pass unharmed (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
726.text: The small sentients are grateful for your generosity, and they ask you to join them on the final stage of their pilgrimage. If you agree, gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and go northeast to [b]Location 411[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 morale.

727.text: A sentient heading out of the City of Stone recommends a visit to the adventure academy followed by the spa. Gain $1, 2 boost, and [2694d0]1 move[-].

728.text: The sentient waves off your concern, explaining that they’re practicing for a much more dangerous leap to the west. You’re welcome to join them if you’d like, though. If you agree, gain sentient [b]Item 1347[/b] and go west to [b]Location 722[/b]. If not, they request that you look for their lost pet, a hovertail that recently flew off to the east (gain quest [b]Item 1650[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

729.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

730.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to tell you about the cave (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
730.text: The guard lowers their voice and shares a tip about the weighted puzzle trap in the cave tunnel barrier. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; go to cave [b]Location 020[/b].

731.text: Your augsuit eagerly links to the spaceship, extracting the ample backup storage of food paste. Gain 2 health.

732.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the Traveler about the origins of this ship
732.text: The Traveler gathers their thoughts. “We were a small crew on a terraforming vessel, leading the way for a colony ship. The chrono technology was still in the experimental stage—you will discover it in another 100 years or so. It mostly worked as intended: We arrived at a barren planet, jumped back in time a few hundred million years, seeded the planet with the origins of life, then jumped forward to see the results. Sometime during that final jump the chrono tech failed, and most of the crew died in the crash. I was the lone survivor, though only thanks to the ship’s life support system. My brain and body remain inside the ship, with this hologram free to roam the world.” Gain 3 boost and destiny [b]Item 1608[/b] (place it in the center).

733.text: A leaf sentient whispers that this is the Pearl. It appeared at the same time as the person you know as the Traveler, the origin of life on this planet. Touching it will ignite the magic inside of you. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [a84fc0]1 look[-]; you may continue.

734.text: To your surprise, someone yells back. “What’s the future like?” they ask. You describe your surroundings, and after a few seconds, they make an offer. If you toss some coins through the rift, they will invest the money in real estate that should gain great dividends in the future, which they will stash under the bridge. Do you accept?

choices.outcome: roll a skill die. If it’s [fd8c46]engage[-], triple your investment. If it’s [fff349]take[-], lose your investment. For any other roll, double your investment.
Gain 1 morale.

735.text: You tap on the glass, and the sentient lowers their hands. They then step through the glass without impediment. You convince them to join you for a journey, and they suggest heading anywhere but the scalding deserts to the north. Gain sentient [b]Item 1341[/b].

736.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a passing sentient about this field of glass
736.text: The sentient—a large blob of sand with a slow cadence—explains that this is a graveyard. Most sand sentients can live for hundreds of years, their granules split across multiple hosts. But when they break the law—past, present, or future—they are punished in a ceremony that instantly turns them to glass, which is shattered and scattered here. The sentient shudders and departs. Gain 2 boost, or pay 1 boost to continue.

737.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the occupant of the island when they’re available
737.text: When you’re within earshot, choose one:

choices.option: Share a story with the occupant
choices.outcome: They’re eager to hear more tales of your adventure, but there’s something weighing on them. They reveal that their partner was recently murdered inside the home, and they cannot rest until the mystery is solved. If you can find the culprit, it will give them closure. Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and quest [b]Item 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Negotiate with the resident to buy their house and its contents (pay a discounted price of $25 due to the murder recently committed inside the house; you may later repeat this action for this option only if you don’t choose it now)
choices.outcome: Gain items [b]Item 880[/b], [b]Item 888[/b], and [b]Item 898[/b], and structure [b]Item 1692[/b]; you may place each of these items in your reserve or your grid.

738.action: [fd8c46]INTERACT[-] with the orb or a passing sentient

choices.outcome: The outside of the orb is a message board. Read what other travelers have posted about this area by visiting orb.stonemaiergames.com; gain 1 boost.
A sentient heading out of Galleon Village recommends the tour guide and the healer. Gain 2 boost.

739.action: [fd8c46]BOAST[-] of your feats in case anyone is listening
739.text: Sure enough, three pirates emerge from the jungle and share their own daring stories and close calls. One declares that they had their wish granted by a magical well to the west; another says they tamed a serpent in a cave to the southeast. The last pirate says they stole the mech suit found on the island to their back, but they’ve never gotten it to work. You may either pay 2 boost to gain vehicle [b]Item 984[/b], or gain 2 boost.

740.text: You stride into the clearing, intentionally tripping over a small stick and comically falling toward the group. The sentient stops shouting and rushes over to help you to your feet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient notices the seeds spilling from your pocket. They are very excited by this, and they beg you to plant the seeds here, walk through the time portal to the north, and find the future version of this location. If you accept, lose item [b]Item 1020[/b] to gain sentient [b]Item 1364[/b] and quest [b]Item 1699[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 3 boost.

The sentient is shouting about an important tree that was growing here—it seems to have disappeared overnight, and it will take 100 years to grow another. They speak of the rarity of the tree’s seeds and mention that they are found in a cave to the southeast. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-].

741.text: The sentient explains that this is a time anomaly that allows you to travel 100 years into the future. Those who enter the gateway will have a limited range due to the immutable laws of chrono-science, but it’s still worth a quick trip. They recommend that you hide something nearby before entering, then dig it back up in the future. Gain 2 boost; you may choose an item to hide nearby (select an item in your reserve or transfer an item card from your grid to your reserve). You may continue.

742.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] how the sentient survives and thrives in the desert
742.text: The sentient reveals that the shell-like structure nearby is actually a flowering plant called the desert maw that contains refreshing nutrients. Gain flora [b]Item 1057[/b].

743.text: The sentient halts their approach and then doubles over laughing. “Oh, that’s good, very good. You would make an excellent soldier.” They give you directions to the City of Waves to the southwest. Gain item [b]Item 1251[/b] and 1 boost; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 9 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region L, and the City of Waves is the city in region P).

744.text: Both sentients quickly begin boasting about their biggest catch, and they challenge you to catch an even bigger fish in the ocean. They give you an oxygen mask to aid this endeavor. Gain item [b]Item 964[/b] and quest [b]Item 1660[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

745.action: [fd8c46]HAIL[-] a ride from the boat’s captain
745.text: The captain offers you a ride. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost, and you may hitch a ride northwest to a jungle grove on [b]Location 740[/b], northeast to an elemental monster on [b]Location 752[/b], southeast to a destructive kraken on [b]Location 750[/b], or southwest to a seaside city on [b]Location 738[/b].
The captain gives you a fresh fish and bids you farewell (gain 1 health).

746.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] a sentient to build a structure
746.text: The sentient offers their construction services to you for a $7 fee.

choices.outcome: Gain an armory ([b]Item 1267[/b]), apothecary ([b]Item 1268[/b]), blacksmith ([b]Item 1269[/b]), tailor ([b]Item 1278[/b]), shipyard ([b]Item 1282[/b]), or market ([b]Item 1284[/b]).
The sentient gives you a few tips about the construction process instead (gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b], $2, or 1 boost).

747.text: You slowly scratch behind its ears, feeling it purr as it leans against you. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

748.text: A sentient heading out of Sandstone Village recommends the glassblower and the sand centipede bait supply depot. Gain 2 boost.

749.text: The sentient seems surprised that you’re not familiar with the composition of the common lotus. “This innocent-looking flower giveth and taketh away. Be careful if you choose to partake in its whims.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

750.action: [fd8c46]INTIMIDATE[-] the kraken to return to the depths
750.text: It takes great courage to face down a beast like this octopod, and when you do, the locals express their gratitude with a generous gift. Gain item [b]Item 899[/b], 1 morale, and [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

751.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] the sentient as a guide for a grand adventure
751.text: If you pay $1, the child carefully inspects the coin before accepting this important job, with the condition that their loyal dust mouse can accompany you (gain animal [b]Item 835[/b] and quest [b]Item 1643[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). If you don’t pay, the child shrugs and says they’ll hire you instead (gain $1 and quest [b]Item 1643[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

752.text: The elemental fills your mind with visions of grandeur and an intense compulsion to release it. Centuries ago, the sentients of this world banded together to tether this elemental—and others of its kind— preventing them from freely roaming and ravaging the planet. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

753.text: A rider tells you to hop on, and you grip onto their warm, metallic waist as they ride north. Go to [b]Location 754[/b].

754.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the judges (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
754.text: The judges welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SPEED[/b][-] action.

755.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the sentient about the ship that crashed here
755.text: Through the sentient’s sobs you manage to learn more details than you ever want to know about crafting a ship from ancestral trees. Just when you think they have nothing more to say, they launch into an in-depth explanation of nautical terms, followed by an account of the ship’s maiden—and final—voyage that ended with an unfortunate encounter with a kraken. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and [0b955e]1 help[-].

756.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the treasure chest
756.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1189[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1162[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

757.text: A sentient emerges from behind a waterfall and mentions the solid metal barrier inside the cave. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

758.text: The creature responds by swallowing you whole. All goes dark until it spits you out. Lose 1 health and go to cave [b]Location 048[/b].

759.text: Mildly annoyed by the interruption but even more annoyed by their current student, the teacher accepts your offer. If you pay $2, gain sentient [b]Item 1343[/b]. If not, the sentient waves their hand to heal you and sends you on your way; gain 1 health.

076.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] for attention, your voice booming through the dome
076.text: A few seconds pass before a sentient’s head appears at the mouth of the chimney. “Get out of here!” they say, gesturing toward the exit before vanishing back up the pipe. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]3 move[-]; you may continue.

760.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to hire you to protect the castle (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
760.text: The guard mutters something about mercenary inflation but can’t afford to refuse your offer. Gain $5 and quest [b]Item 1659[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

761.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] a guard to let you enter (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
761.text: You eventually convince the guard that you aren’t a bandit. Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b] and go north to [b]Location 762[/b].

762.text: The sentient is incredibly excited to converse with an alien, and you soon learn that the Founder’s Temple to the north contains a new egg that will take 100 years to hatch. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1637[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

763.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the guards to allow you inside (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
763.text: You smooth-talk the guards into believing that you have an amazing—but top secret—offering for someone they keep calling the “Founder.” Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 589[/b].

764.text: You don’t understand what you’re saying, but the camaraderie feels good after being alone on this planet. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

765.action: [fd8c46]BEFRIEND[-] an attendant so you can take something from the lost-and-found pile
765.text: Roll 3 skill dice. If you have at least a pair, gain item [b]Item 1042[/b]. Otherwise, gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions).

766.text: The Traveler advocates for you, and soon the balloon makes an abrupt turn in midair as if the sentient at its helm could control the wind itself. This sorcery turns out to be real, and the sentient teaches you the basics of wind magic. Gain spell [b]Item 1379[/b] and go either northwest to a fluttering animal on [b]Location 461[/b] or northeast to a windswept tower on [b]Location 346[/b].

767.text: A sentient headed toward the capital city recommends the forge district just northeast of the entrance and the Founder’s Temple to the northwest. Gain 2 boost.

768.text: The sentient cheerfully greets you and offers you a sample of some freshly fried street food. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You can buy a full dish for $1 (gain 2 morale) and/or buy a map of the city for $3 (gain item [b]Item 1154[/b]).
The sentient takes pity on you and gives you $1.

769.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] the sentient to be your bouncer
769.text: The sentient considers your offer and finally settles on the fee of $3. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain sentient [b]Item 1330[/b].

The sentient strolls through the tavern with you, during which you hear locals talking about rock climbing and pets. The bouncer can’t stop talking about some wind sentients who didn’t pay for their birthday party and they jetted north. If you can find them, you can keep the fee they should have paid. Gain quest [b]Item 1653[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

077.text: The shocked sentients nearly upend their table as they turn to see you. “What are YOU doing here?” they ask. You manage to assure them that you mean no harm, and they let you go up to the top level while they finish their game. Gain ability [b]Item 1470[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 078[/b].

770.text: The vessel’s owner is hesitant to part with their prized possession, but they agree to sell it to you for $10. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b].
They seem relieved—they love this boat. Instead, they offer to accompany you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1341[/b].

771.action: [fd8c46]TRADE[-] with the captain for ownership of the galleon
771.text: The captain offers to sell you the ship for $30. If you pay, gain vehicle [b]Item 1016[/b]. If not, the captain offers you a swig of ale and a hearty slap on the back (gain 1 morale and continue).

772.text: Standing on the shore to the left of the ship, you talk to the sentient about why they’re preventing the ship from passing. They explain that the contraband Spor has been entering the city at escalating rates, and they’re suspicious of landwalker ships like this one. With the ship’s captain assuring you that they’re not involved, you promise the sentient that you’ll hunt down the source. They give you some food for your journey. Gain 1 health and quest [b]Item 1666[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

773.action: [fd8c46]PLEAD[-] for sentients on the parapet to help you up the wall
773.text: A few sentients chuckle at you and continue their stroll along the wall, but one takes pity on you and lowers a rope when no one is looking. They pull you up and welcome you to the capital city. Go north to [b]Location 774[/b]; you may tip the sentient $2 for their assistance:

choices.outcome: The sentient nods knowingly. “I knew you’d reward my act of kindness. Thank you!” Gain sentient [b]Item 1342[/b].
The sentient smiles to themselves. “No worries—I knew there was no reward at the end of the rope.”

774.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to travel with you (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
774.text: The sentient asks for your assurance that you won’t travel to cold lands east of the city, and when you confirm, they agree to join you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1315[/b].

775.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] the bulky sentient as your bodyguard
775.text: The sentient is open to the opportunity, but they don’t work for free. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain sentient [b]Item 1334[/b].
The sentient offers to join you after you complete a quest for them (gain quest [b]Item 1635[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

776.text: The vendor presents a few options. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Buy your choice of a robe to keep you cool ([b]Item 966[/b]) or a coat to keep you warm ([b]Item 922[/b]).

The vendor says that they’ll fill your purse if you deliver a package to the northwest; you may either gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and quest [b]Item 1638[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply) or gain 1 boost and continue.

777.text: In a monotone metallic voice, they explain that this is the Council of Elders, and that you’re welcome to join the session if you’re unarmed. Set any weapons aside temporarily and go to interior [b]Location 583[/b] (reclaim any weapons when you exit).

778.action: [fd8c46]ENTERTAIN[-] nearby sentients with a juggling act
778.text: You grab a few pieces of fruit and soon have the crowd clapping along. They toss you a few coins before dispersing. Gain $5.

779.action: [fd8c46]CONSULT[-] with the Traveler about escaping this planet
779.text: The Traveler’s tone grows somber. “Instead of leaving, why not make a home for yourself in a city like this?” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center).

078.text: The sentient looks up from their task, and their eyes light up at the sight of someone other than their captors, a perilous situation that they quickly explain. They are but a humble torchmaker, but they got into debt with the Spormonger and were conscripted to this remote tower. The sentient begs you to help them escape. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

780.action: [fd8c46]GREET[-] the occupants of one of the apartments surrounding the garden
780.text: The sentient who answers the door is richly dressed—this is expensive property. They complain that the vagrants who bathe in the nearby waterfall are at fault for attracting vermin to the garden. They shoo you away; you can hear the lock click behind you when they close the door. Gain 2 boost.

781.text: You emerge from the bushes, placating both sentients and mediating a healthy discussion about a stolen object. Choose one:

choices.option: Side with the thief (on the right)
choices.outcome: They thank you for supporting their culture. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

choices.option: Side with the owner (on the left)
choices.outcome: They thank you and offer their services as a guide. The thief bumps against you as they leave, and your purse feels a little lighter afterward. Lose $2 and gain sentient [b]Item 1344[/b].

782.text: The sentient shushes you and ducks behind a log, pulling you down with them. Despite their fear, they convey a desire to give you some money. If you accept, gain $5. If not, gain 1 boost and continue.

783.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the sentient to join you for a stroll (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
783.text: The sentient intended to only take a short break from work, but sensing the opportunity to chat about one of their favorite topics— money—they take you up on the offer. Gain sentient [b]Item 1322[/b] and 1 boost on your character.

784.action: [fd8c46]WHISPER[-] to a passing sentient, keeping your voice low out of respect in case the ruins are a sacred place
784.text: The sentient appreciates the honorific tone, but they say that this was simply a commercial area a long time ago. They mention the numerous glass vials at the closest entrance; that portion of the ruins was probably an apothecary. Gain 2 boost and continue.

785.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] up to those on the bridge
785.text: Several guards look over the edge. They offer to pull you up if you help them protect the bridge against robbers after the sun sets. If you agree, gain quest [b]Item 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

786.action: [fd8c46]PERSUADE[-] the guards to grant you entry (you may pay $X to decrease this cost by X)
786.text: You smoothly persuade the guards to let you enter alone. Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 591[/b].

787.text: The sentient gestures excitedly to the north. “The museum,” they say. “I just heard that a rare map is on display there. I need to steal—I mean, see—it before it’s too late!” Gain 1 boost.

788.action: [fd8c46]HIRE[-] the sentient to work for you
788.text: If you pay $2, gain sentient [b]Item 1339[/b]. If you don’t pay, the sentient shows you how they earn money. Gain either the rob ability ([b]Item 1481[/b]) or the steal ability ([b]Item 1482[/b]); you may continue.

789.text: You may sell 1 card from your grid, reserve, or supply for its value. Then you may buy a fancy weapon ([b]Item 1038[/b]) for $8. If you neither buy nor sell, the vendor tosses you a coin out of pity (gain $1); gain 1 boost.

079.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

790.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] around to see if anyone wants the rope on the nearby branch
790.text: None of the passing sentients seem to care, so you untie the rope. Gain item [b]Item 901[/b]; you may pay 1 boost to continue.

791.text: The transmission requires minimal effort, as the radio is the only functional machinery on the ship. It seems to be the source of the signal that brought you to this planet in the first place. You’ll need to triangulate the signal to receive a rescue response. Gain 1 morale and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center) with 1 signal token on it. If you already have that destiny, add 1 signal token to it.

795.text: Another player gains 1 random skill, refreshes 1 challenge die on a card in their grid, or gains 1 boost. Gain 1 morale and continue.

799.text: The sentient has made this pit their home and has no intention of leaving, but they agree to give you a big boost toward the gap in the ceiling. Gain [2694d0]3 move[-] and continue.

080.text: The startled sentient powers down their blowtorch and wipes their brow. “I’m melting this contraband so the original owners won’t be able to claim it, obviously.” They toss you a lump of melted gold and return to their work. Gain item [b]Item 1185[/b].

801.text: There is something about the shard that inspires you to speak your truth. You whisper it to the glowing stone, and its glow expands to accept you for who you are. Gain item [b]Item 1707[/b].

081.text: Data streams into your implants, nearly overwhelming them. You learn of the circuit sentients’ hope to venture beyond their homeworld if they could only find a way to untether themselves from their network of servers here. Gain destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center) and continue.

082.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

083.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

084.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]BALANCE[/b][-] or [0b955e]help-[b]ASSEMBLE[/b][-] action.

085.action: [fd8c46]BET[-] on the fight club (requires at least $1)
085.text: Place card [b]Location 797[/b] (it’s a large card) on the table; it shows a bracket of 8 fighters. The numbers in hexes represent each fighter’s strength (the number of skill dice the fighter will roll in each head-to-head bout). Run the tournament by rolling dice for each fighter and comparing the results. The winner of each bout is the fighter with more [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results (the fighter with the lower strength wins ties thanks to crowd support).Before you begin the tournament, you may bet on any number of fighters ($1, $2, or $3). If you win a first-round bout, gain the amount you bet on that bout. If a fighter on whom you bet wins the entire tournament, gain the amount you bet times the coin multiplier noted on that fighter. For all other bets, lose the amount you bet. After the tournament, lose card [b]Location 797[/b].

086.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

087.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] a guard if you can join the miners for a few hours
087.text: The guard shrugs and hands you a pickaxe, pointing to an open spot in the line. You soon learn from talking to other miners that they’re paying off their gambling debts from the nearby casino by digging for precious resources, with the jackpot being the long-lost Dodecahedron artifact deep inside the planet. Gain item [b]Item 896[/b] and 1 boost.

088.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] to see if anyone else is here
088.text: The sound echoes throughout the cavern, and you’re about to move on when you hear someone yell, “Follow my voice!” It’s coming from the east, where your progress is halted by a glowing wall covered by ivy. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

089.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

090.action: [fd8c46]SHOUT[-] at the sentinel guarding the entrance to ask them what you’re looking at
090.text: The sentinel plods into the cavern, waves a massive paw over the treasure, and explains that this is the vault of the central bank. It may seem disorganized, but apparently there is a method to the madness. As they turn back to their post, they say that you can probably search for a treasure buried so deep no one will ever notice it’s missing. Gain either [a84fc0]1 look[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

091.action: [fd8c46]PICK[-] the lock on the treasure chest
091.text: With a satisfying click, the lock pops open. Roll 6 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 1020[/b], which you have a hunch should be planted on a specific location. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1036[/b]. Otherwise, gain $8.

092.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

093.text: You and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

094.text: If you have the metal curse, the sentient ignores you (don’t gain anything and continue). Otherwise, they recommend the black market and the assassin’s guild (gain 2 boost and you may continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]BALANCE[/b][-] action).

095.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the mother of the eggs out into the open
095.text: A large animal emerges from the shadows, clearly wary of your intentions. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The large animal reminds you of an octopus, just bigger and landbound. Gain 1 boost and continue.
The animal’s maternal instincts kick into high gear, and it struggles mightily against you. You wrestle the animal into submission. Gain animal [b]Item 825[/b].

096.action: [fd8c46]COAX[-] the dragon with the prospect of treasure

choices.option: Pay $10 to earn the loyalty of the greedy dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon can’t resist its greatest weakness; gain animal [b]Item 807[/b].
The dragon strikes at you again. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-].

097.text: Covering your face to protect yourself from the toxic fumes as much as possible, you and another player may refresh all challenge dice from any 1 column in each of your grids. Until end of turn, you may place challenge dice on cards in that crewmate’s grid. Continue.

098.text: A small sentient is testing out a new pair of shoes on the staircases, and they lead you to the back of the cavern. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 044[/b]; if you pay 1 boost, also gain sentient [b]Item 1363[/b].

099.action: [fd8c46]ASK[-] the tour guide about the meaning of the glyphs
099.text: The tour guide is startled by your sudden appearance, but they clear their throat and explain that the cave painting depicts the beginning of life on this planet. The world was a blank slate until the Great Collision, which seeded the planet with the origins of life. Gain 2 boost.
